name: Team Christy
subject: If Donald Trump can vote by mail, you should be able to too
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Our right to vote is one of the most precious rights we have in our democracy. To be able to add our voice to elections is critical in the well-being of our country.

That's why it's so important that we make sure everyone has the ability to vote safely -- especially now when so much is on the line in this upcoming election.

California sent every registered voter an absentee ballot for the special election to make sure each voter had the chance to vote safely. Trump might call this "FRAUD", but to us, this _just makes sense_. **And it's what we should do this November.**

**Vote-by-mail is one of the safest and most secure ways for folks to participate in our elections -- and it should be an option available to all voters this November.** We're doing the right thing here in California sending a ballot to everyone, but we can't stop there.

**[If you agree we need a national vote-by-mail system, add your name alongside Christy's on this petition>> ](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f2733/2707215534/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjZfdmJtamEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://www.paction.us/votebymail4all/em20_200526_vbmja-full")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f2733/2707215534/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjZfdmJtamEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://www.paction.us/votebymail4all/em20_200526_vbmja-full") It's outrageous that Donald Trump and his fellow Republicans are attacking vote-by-mail. _Especially when Trump himself voted by mail multiple times._

**We should always be working towards making voting _easier, not harder,_ for all voters. **

During this pandemic, all citizens should have the ability to vote while protecting their health. Given the uncertainty of how long this will last, we need to plan ahead -- and ensure that every voter can vote-by-mail if they choose.

**[This just makes sense. If you agree that there should be a national vote-by-mail system, sign on to this petition demanding vote-by-mail for all in November.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f2733/2707215534/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjZfdmJtamEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://www.paction.us/votebymail4all/em20_200526_vbmja-full")**

Thanks for stepping up. This is too important.

\-- Team Christy

| Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights.
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f270c/2707215534/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjZfdmJtamEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200526_vbmja-full")

---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f270d/2707215534/VEsD/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f270e/2707215534/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb98/29776869/9bf5f46/569f270f/2707215534/VEsB/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 5/26
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, I hope you had a restful and relaxing Memorial Day weekend. With yesterday being Memorial Day, I want to thank the men and women who have given everything for the cause of freedom. Because of the men and women who have paid the ultimate sacrifice protecting our country, my family and I are safe. In fact, I’m able to run for office in a free democracy because they gave everything to protect our freedom. \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- It's been another great week being back on our big orange bus, traveling the state, and meeting so many of you. In my second week back on the road, I visited Smith, Macon, Trousdale, Shelby, Benton, Henry, Stewart, Hickman and Humphreys Counties. I thoroughly enjoyed my time meeting with local mayors and great conservatives around our state. Many folks are still understandably anxious about COVID-19 and its potential spread. While I am traveling the state, we will be doing so wisely, and maintain social distancing protocols. As always, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [manny@drmannyforsenate.com](http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com). **Events:** This Saturday,[ I'll be back home in Coffee County for our first townhall.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-j/) I'll be sharing why I'm running for Senate and taking your questions, and I hope you'll join us. As always, stay up to date with where we'll be next at [DrMannyForSenate.com/Events](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-t/) **News: ** Last week I announced a plan to tackle a major problem across middle Tennessee: the spread of Asian Carp. We need federal resources as part of the effort to stop the spread of Asian Carp. They are depleting food sources and changing the entire ecosystem of rivers and streams. Native fish are at risk of being replaced entirely by this invasive species. Because of this, we face huge economic threats if the Asian Carp invasion continues. By utilizing federal resources on the front end, we can save ourselves millions of dollars in the long run. [Ready my full plan here in the Paris Post-Intelligencer!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-i/) ICYMI: I announced we are embarking on a 95 County Tour of our great state. I've been traveling across all of Tennessee for the past year and I can't wait to travel across all 95 counties again this summer. Keep an eye on our [Facebook page](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-d/) and [drmannyforsenate.com](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-h/) to see when we will be coming to your city! Read our releases from the _[Tennessee Star](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-k/) _and _[TNJ: On the Hill](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-u/)._ **Social Media:** Last week was National Rescue Dog Day. It has been four months since we adopted our rescue dog, Arthur, from Memphis. He was three days away from being euthanized, when ALIVE Memphis rescued him and fostered him! We are so blessed to have him in our lives. He truly "rescued" us because our beloved pug of 15 years passed away right before Christmas. It has been a difficult journey without him, but we know he is in a better place. Arthur has been a bright spot for all of us these past few months and is incredibly gentle with the kids. He keeps us laughing with all his funny antics and his deep howls. Thank you, ALIVE Rescue Memphis, (Ranise and Rose!) what an amazing organization! - Maya Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-o/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-b/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-n/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, wear a mask even if you are feeling fine, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please continue to adhere to the guidelines being put forth by [President Trump](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-p/), [Governor Lee](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-x/), and [the CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-m/), even as the economy gets up and running again. I can't wait to get out to every corner of Tennessee in our big orange bus and continue meeting you all. I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator. Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of you! Dr. Manny P.S. There are less than 75 days until Election Day! A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkqdltk-olhhkyhhid-c/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Don't Miss Tele-Town Hall With Lara Trump
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-jt/) May 26, 2020 [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-r/) **DON'T MISS: Tele-Town Hall With Lara Trump** There's still time to RSVP for today's tele-town hall with Bill Hagerty and Lara Trump, Senior Advisor to President Trump's reelection campaign. The town hall will kick off today at 1:15 p.m. ET/12:15 p.m. CT. Lara is the second member of the Trump family to hold an event in support of Bill and will give #TeamHagerty an update on the President's campaign, as well as the need to retain a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate. Let us know you'll be listening by responding to this **[RSVP.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Bill's Blueprint To Support Our Veterans** Last week, Bill released his latest in a series of policy plans: **[Bill's Blueprint To Support Our Veterans.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-j/)** Freedom is not free, and we must always take care of those who have risked so much to protect our American way of life. It's crucial for the federal government to care for our military service members, who sacrifice so much. As the U.S. Ambassador to Japan, Bill saw first-hand the dedication and impact of our military as they ensure the security of our nation and allies in a very challenging region. In his plan, Bill lays out how he will stand with President Donald Trump to ensure American veterans have access to the health care and benefits they were promised and have earned. Read the full plan **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-t/)** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-i/) **WATCH: Dr. Tedros Is China 's Enabler**Following President Donald Trump's [scathing letter](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-d/) to the World Health Organization (WHO) holding them accountable for enabling the Communist Chinese regime to misreport and cover-up valuable information regarding the Wuhan virus, #TeamHagerty released a timeline video exposing the WHO's leader, Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, for his close ties to Communist regime. Dr. Tedros has been a long time ally and enabler of the Communist Chinese regime. In the Senate, Bill will continue to work with President Trump to hold Communist China and the organizations it influences responsible for their complicity and cover-up of the Wuhan virus that put hundreds of thousands of lives and the world economy in danger. Watch the latest video exposing Dr. Tedros **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-h/)**[.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-u/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-m/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-c/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Townhall:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-q/) **Bill Hagerty: The Communist Chinese Regime Must Be Held Accountable**[One America News Network:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-a/) **Bill Hagerty: Task Force Giving President Trump Solid Advice, Focused On Quick Economic Bounce Back**[Nashville Post:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Senate candidates book ads through primary**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-z/) **Bill Hagerty Releases Video Critical of the World Health Organization**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-v/) **Bill Hagerty Delivers Statement on Michael Flynn
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill Hagerty's background and experience as a successful businessman, like President Trump, is greatly needed as we work to get our economy going again."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-g/)_" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revial. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-yk/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-yu/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
---|---|---|---|---

Nashville, TN 37215

[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-pedktt-l-jh)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-pedktt-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-jk) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-pedktt-fuutjhhtj-tl/)

name: Majority Defenders
subject: ALERT: Twitter's Bias Strikes Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Silicon Valley's bias against conservatives is a threat to our democracy. Twitter and the other social media giants must be reined in, and it's critical for conservatives like you to step up and make your voice heard.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=42588334&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTc2MjU3NzM3MAS2&spReportId=MTc2MjU3NzM3MAS2)
****
****
__

**MARSHA FOR SENATE MAJORITY DEFENDERS**
**
BREAKING NEWS**
"Twitter flags Trump tweet with fact-checking label for first time"
_\- CBS News, 05/26/20_

In a clear politically-motivated move, Twitter slapped President Trump's tweets with a "fact check" label, directing users to a page stating "these claims are unsubstantiated, according to CNN, Washington Post and others."

You read that right -- **Twitter is relying on the liberal FAKE NEWS media to determine the accuracy of content on its platform.**

This new "policy" is shameful, biased and unfortunately not the first time we've seen this happen.

In 2017, Twitter infamously censored Marsha Blackburn's campaign launch video for championing her pro-life record, which the social media giant deemed "inflammatory" content.
_**
Marsha fought back, won that fight, and continues to stand up to Silicon Valley.**_

Just like Marsha, President Trump is NOT backing down. He and Marsha need your help to dismantle Twitter and the liberal media's scheme to manipulate news consumption and our freedom of speech.

**FIGHT BACK AGAINST SILICON VALLEY**

**[CHIP IN $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1ODgzMzQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjU3NzM3MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Silicon Valley's bias against conservatives is a threat to our democracy.

Twitter and the other social media giants must be reined in, and it's critical for conservatives like you to step up and make your voice heard.

**Now, more than ever, President Trump and Marsha Blackburn are counting on you to join their fight against Silicon Valley -- the outcome of this election year could depend on it.**

subject: RE: Real leadership in Washington

body:
We built this coalition one supporter, one conversation, and one donor at a time. Now we need to ensure every voter knows how to cast their ballot. Chip in to our Voter Education Fund today!

---
|

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Why these calls are so essential
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

We’re
making phenomenal progress. But to win a Democratic majority in the State
House and stop Trump forever, we need to do a lot more.

Last night alone, Powered by People volunteers made 192,038 calls to
unregistered Democratic voters. We need more volunteer power if we’re
going to help register 500,000 currently unregistered, likely Democrats.

That’s why I’m asking you to join a virtual phone bank with Beto. Here are
two opportunities:

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42553?source=ema20200527-91519&t=1001&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42553?source=ema20200527-91519&t=1002&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]Monday, June 1, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42553?source=ema20200527-91519&t=1003&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42554?source=ema20200527-91519&t=1004&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]Virtual Voter Registration Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42554?source=ema20200527-91519&t=1005&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]Monday, June 8, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42554?source=ema20200527-91519&t=1006&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]Get more info or RSVP »

It is imperative that we all show up, no matter where you live. This work
will have national consequences.

If we register 500,000 new Democratic voters in this presidential election
cycle, we could deliver Texas’s 38 electoral college votes to the
Democratic nominee and stop Trump’s second term in the White House.

That’s why these phone calls are so essential.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42555?refcode=ema20200527-91519&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy ]But if you can’t join us to make calls, please pitch in
$3 or anything you can afford to help Powered by People
reach and register thousands of Democratic voters.

I couldn’t be prouder to be part of this team. Let’s stay focused and make
more calls, y’all!

Thank you,

Kate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=91519%2E444211%2ER4G2Zy

subject: Our Nation's Pledge Deserves Respect. 🇺🇸

---
| Derek, I couldn't believe it when I first heard it. Last week, Democrat Deb Pignatelli altered our Nation's Pledge of Allegiance during an Executive Council meeting, stating "_Liberty and Justice for**SOME**._"
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMwMzc5NTcxODMxNjQxNjg4JmM9YjFwOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTIzMTgzMTAmZD1kNmE0ZTZm.-c-btGLd8Z5b8iuzrOfRHEo6zfvt_tnff8Nv3rkDzL4)
---
| |
---
| Patriotic Granite Staters have given their all to preserve Liberty and Justice for ALL Americans, and over 100,000 of our Nation's Veterans currently live in New Hampshire. Pignatelli's disgraceful remark is an insult to all of them. _**The good news**_ , out of this entire episode, is that Deb Pignatelli is up for election in less than 6 months. That gives us 6 months [to continue organizing, raising money, and executing the right strategy](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMwMzc5NTcxODMxNjQxNjg4JmM9YjFwOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTIzMTgzMzgmZD1nMXIxczRx.eDQitugfBDh3HC2rUsfmecsu-hzP-VCLBrZnxm9LgGg) to **defeat her on November 3rd.**
---
---
| | | | [HOLD HER ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMwMzc5NTcxODMxNjQxNjg4JmM9YjFwOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTIzMTgzNTAmZD1zOHo3ajJt.3wQvPRtXZamrt354L17omapQWjfyun_KPZkCOxtAvaE)
---
---
| |
---
| In order to defeat her this November we will need the resources to win. [Invest in the NHGOP today with your most generous donation to help us hold Deb Pignatelli accountable and defeat her this Fall.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMwMzc5NTcxODMxNjQxNjg4JmM9YjFwOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTIzMTgzNjYmZD1hM241cDdt.yKJ8OOE6Op2MRaa0zUPKtcYXTlGDutaF4tRjQEQ4Kmw) The Democrat Majority on the Executive Council have been dedicated puppets to their Left-wing special interests. Those same special interests will support Pignatelli with massive contributions to keep her in that seat - [we need everything on the table to take it back.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMwMzc5NTcxODMxNjQxNjg4JmM9YjFwOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTIzMTgzNzYmZD1uM3QzZDhq.DyKQTbaaWxGJy9RddBSnRhfbYsQyViaDfc0F1bYgfOw) Councilor Pignatelli disgraced our Nation's Pledge of Allegiance and disrespected all who have sworn to protect Liberty and Justice for All. [Help the NHGOP hold her accountable today.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDMwMzc5NTcxODMxNjQxNjg4JmM9YjFwOCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTIzMTgzODAmZD1rN3I4ajBi.6jQhnIeYGwXcqefdcTGkJjYfwOihXDOHhZp9TKn-UAQ) Sincerely,
Stephen Stepanek

body:
It is so critical that we elect strong leaders in Congress this upcoming election, which is why I’m so honored to endorse my good friend Brian Fitzpat [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=ecadd271be724dd4bea0cef547f9b164&_e=gzOXIPStYWjR-boVu4TyqAxGq1LIU7e0AEXjDUzokx5qmeE-EM9xTnB8Ig_XpjocTID6BeQw-LIvH8WO6hyXsN5gbHjgpGe9cQZ5tBJkLq6hPCgut-lGFd03fjqt764hPpWd2c7oFHSx-0IpTb0FBqSJ2AJ_l9_CM1PYOPX7oPMxsiU8nghEFOzKqnFIUVBKh8xqUroDih9EQ08s8E2C-3yrP11y7OcR4G1u6T1fqCLkERrxHtOXL6ohfbAKKQ54IQwCb0aX1_ekpJnl5TAa20_Te_bHla4D6HmhQ8H9EtYW_OLPDYoXz6ktEvEKsCXTLa4-eSPslWnZqYtY5rIIFH_1sU8RzRNyW8Hk-ripFog%3D) Friend, It is so critical that we elect strong leaders in Congress this upcoming election, which is why I’m so honored to endorse my good friend Brian Fitzpatrick. I’ve had the privilege of working alongside Brian for several years, and I can truly attest to his character and work ethic on behalf of his constituents in Pennsylvania. He is the epitome of a dedicated public servant, putting the interests of those he serves above all else. Brian is a true consensus-builder, fighting every day for common-sense solutions to our nation’s toughest problems. He genuinely and deeply cares about the people of his home district and I very much look forward to working with him in the next Congress.

[Stand with Steve and Brian](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=ecadd271be724dd4bea0cef547f9b164&_e=gzOXIPStYWjR-boVu4TyqAxGq1LIU7e0AEXjDUzokx5qmeE-EM9xTnB8Ig_XpjocTID6BeQw-LIvH8WO6hyXsN5gbHjgpGe9cQZ5tBJkLq6hPCgut-lGFd03fjqt764hPpWd2c7oFHSx-0IpTb0FBk99oRM3r86iJWG7ozx5LqQgQ29s7BePEBCebC8MhRHrX37IefrU3SjGwli0-MZs8kvFKRjHnZ1yGglmoQ0HI5bupWGCLapgAzdOCE4tafAyHLjI5ddj7sDQxA9P7pcHtz3gavDHRlhZqocDKFIxgntwjOb-mhmQLaNCmUT_FtnUQLIP0ksG_SudSzSymJLFCDNfmbJjqCzBt4sejOCNPtk%3D) This Tuesday, June 2nd, please join me in supporting Brian! Your friend, Steve Scalise

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this [link.](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_s=ecadd271be724dd4bea0cef547f9b164&_t=GWifk5-s0O0MEVmU7S9sux-a6QYXAOuisUBczZlyZcc_X9eUXHjC_VXjKvdhFUn5FSpy_BkuMxVWApjfvxTVEOAj8CZVWko-zKaOlFNtifnyHx2kz8t261nDKizoB1whRQGPxTEzFwaOm_41f58N4QTVOFeRgVw_S_j3zc7r7Ks%3D)

body:
Yesterday marked exactly four weeks until our election, and today is another big milestone for the campaign. We launched our first TV ad. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.324/zcBjgwMqRI2GjMxnk-6TrA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKZknu2vicxnzhZV0C6VpOVW0WuZBBN-2FqT-2FwFHLVWZgVvMoeLk7s3W-2FqkcEI9kPgI9NYu0tHiHhABUL-2BvbolpPsmBdl8A6HUOZu7PplEB57SjLT2j1vjUqWJKWw4nQbKeqjaxHAnyKTo0oo5Cp0SOqaW2k-2Fbh8hvrIQopFLiCjGOJTMmq-2BuMkCg61qV-2Fu6SY3YNQXNR8uW1QspjOT9jyyKESkiUWZutbxrKWwpxSeitptHHZaOcdG0Y-2BPlUvIAQkXm3mLBpZBYbbrHW-2BQKA-2FXVbbRO9ZwW-2BNKFvh1tMldMVlA-3D-3D/ETqg) Friend, Yesterday marked exactly four weeks until our election, and today is another big milestone for the campaign. **_[We launched our first TV ad, titled "Making It."](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.324/zcBjgwMqRI2GjMxnk-6TrA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKZknu2vicxnzhZV0C6VpOVW0WuZBBN-2FqT-2FwFHLVWZgVoyf3XsRc2Mo-2FvMFDI0FOoym9JEB6WmnJ3I5naILB4gMt69bGV8Il3wXUYX3Exb8OWhS9XZoljXNi-2FVPjxiMdN5NnbTnrW8632MOXqOUYcqkLiagCOqIYSqGYg5ExshMKS5eWz6k9FnQjVjrSpcQPKJFfqZdj2y3PAhRwIPj5C6HhTekUBuupf6rLT-2FrucR4JkGIpBYWGw0tX1mJk7yP-2FojZVs1UYq3tRy63cI0-2FKxe13CV0oof-2FvL9zxBCDqzVzrA-3D-3D/tQ1_)_** Throughout the district, voters will learn about Mondaire’s humble beginnings, professional achievements, high-profile endorsements, and commitment to progressive values like Medicare for All and making NY-17 more affordable to live.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.324/zcBjgwMqRI2GjMxnk-6TrA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKZknu2vicxnzhZV0C6VpOVW0WuZBBN-2FqT-2FwFHLVWZgVoXNpTeGwqWOJ5hH2BzOH9qfQ0vVBSPAc1JDLcmqmJVexBy8fRqa9aUHlK-2FKPVGlu6cCf3TDpJ6bzwh5zijCMxtjX7lvDLVtnXr0sokCkm7dl7639jwNCZXqVB40-2F186cd00opWsWq6eNLrzwUqEiKM0gUqs676OiyWahY8vHbfdGKAv188LoaubCsCr79PXN9uT1Gxng30ABHm6j-2B2vm1YYssZZs4JazQfyKXytEPwAo21239xNzV6hmcZkkP0d0g-3D-3D/ezZu)
The ad highlights how Mondaire’s education in East Ramapo public schools allowed him to work in President Obama’s Department of Justice and graduate Harvard Law School.
Throughout this campaign, we've said that all we need to do is get our message out to every Democratic voter in the district, because no one else’s message comes close. Our first TV ad allows us to do just that.
But going up on TV costs money. In fact, TV ads are the most expensive part of our budget and we need to make sure we can stay on TV until Election Day. **_[Will you make a contribution today so we can get our message out over these next four weeks?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.324/zcBjgwMqRI2GjMxnk-6TrA/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKZknu2vicxnzhZV0C6VpOVW0WuZBBN-2FqT-2FwFHLVWZgVuXrmoQE2PO5QJcupz3aI6u7NHYpYUl7nDfJH-2F2MKqC4HdxtHkMRFoc0pDTtH6w416kyNrgF5EJnjVIWgge13CeVQkKuOjufX8DDomDf9DUfkHI-2B-2BYc1DKAHo5LvcORMSZPCXIbvWyTVygXhzgWlm2stbQ7aAO7eUfpKqR9vBrMQmxd70BhGszhjws-2FynIEIj0vn8Hfc5ArTqrt5-2BRmDqLFPh8r6fxzhSkIvm1uat4SzslQ4havvKx1ssizCmBOqGA-3D-3D/P5nF)_**
The final month of the campaign is crunch time. It’s when other candidates will send out mail and start to go on TV too. Unlike our opponents, we don’t have personal wealth, corporate PACs, or fossil fuel industry lobbyists to fund our campaign. We have people like you who believe in this vision and want to see Mondaire win for all of us. We can’t let our message get drowned out by other mailers and other TV ads, and we certainly can’t stop now. **_[By donating today, you’re bringing Mondaire one step closer to victory.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1gA/ni0YAA/t.324/zcBjgwMqRI2GjMxnk-6TrA/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKZknu2vicxnzhZV0C6VpOVW0WuZBBN-2FqT-2FwFHLVWZgVl6wcZE-2FA6kAnxCm27wHux5fzbE2Lp2nGJrYkbv8lNMdjiZeKAyHbPXRMROVOauLACG-2BtCSzjgGSx8QI8ddNsGJMZlQ1SbOrB6ncYYHk8lS-2BBR5uJEXLyCI-2FhDbQWYvb5cg8Fr7ceZtwx4P2jFzddE5l3j67ymG3y-2F-2F9iXtSuAULk6MjKEmA2VcOBkhwNhV7fXucWKooTYuGDN-2Fe21Z8vt1AxSNb88hnSMGf-2Fj7ZKlU6uJz6-2BnGjk-2BvdE9ygPwtblw-3D-3D/umvT)_**
Thank you for all of your support over these past 10 months. We’re so close, and with your help we will win.
Team Mondaire

name: Steve Scalise
subject: America Needs Brian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
It is so critical that we elect strong leaders in Congress this upcoming election, which is why I’m so honored to endorse my good friend Brian Fitzpat [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=75c06905a0444bb392dcbffe8285b586&_e=iEQjcjk-X67AyOgYRv3pN3czuky2f_JVNm5yIlXk01-SGcv0YAs0vj4D9X29Zy3bAtD3shwv-OPXcC62fKcJkKYYBZReo0t51BSWQxHn1LR-IXiJQ1lxdInkskW3mIaYfUv4y9O5xan1Nt-2DgnMWD0uioUIh91QJFva5zp92tAXhsQeQAAEMEHjr3mfJYDwIjfuev4PR1JuApOKY-5XNU--Vwry3PBvHWBlGzR_Obdjl7Ca3LJDqwqq8tnCBDeaPRv9QQFFRIXcNUsVQbJiG92n_T53oQCfAcJqwdTvHwz8OO7bIW8EG-DwxG4Z0giB1WehD1j55pUPL4_CiVU-gz924xHlm2w6DwAiPjfpdjk%3D) Friend, It is so critical that we elect strong leaders in Congress this upcoming election, which is why I’m so honored to endorse my good friend Brian Fitzpatrick. I’ve had the privilege of working alongside Brian for several years, and I can truly attest to his character and work ethic on behalf of his constituents in Pennsylvania. He is the epitome of a dedicated public servant, putting the interests of those he serves above all else. Brian is a true consensus-builder, fighting every day for common-sense solutions to our nation’s toughest problems. He genuinely and deeply cares about the people of his home district and I very much look forward to working with him in the next Congress.

[Stand with Steve and Brian](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=75c06905a0444bb392dcbffe8285b586&_e=iEQjcjk-X67AyOgYRv3pN3czuky2f_JVNm5yIlXk01-SGcv0YAs0vj4D9X29Zy3bAtD3shwv-OPXcC62fKcJkKYYBZReo0t51BSWQxHn1LR-IXiJQ1lxdInkskW3mIaYfUv4y9O5xan1Nt-2DgnMWHlG9dhHW8CBb0zsgJX8WalJ24hVc_nIT_wBDddQMaoLreBrqTt8HhcGbTz3Ra8V-7OrGUrlwit2Osvm1zhtuKYpzGSXH43RxbClPYPVjMJ7znIBZF2h8doL5utGjAuV4uMlnLTNe6C_ik5ml-zsgsMj9Jag0-EAJobMbznPUlatxG3Q1Obqfiiqj7d1RpsHsOahCYM-pMK3Cjly_sUk9II%3D) This Tuesday, June 2nd, please join me in supporting Brian! Your friend, Steve Scalise

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. To unsubscribe from future emails use this [link.](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_s=75c06905a0444bb392dcbffe8285b586&_t=sVwM6ZX--8F7Mw7cGGFaouRoEgJJfqxlb4blYbuizxRXeoEqzQRrvx9XZ3OpgLGFopi7YfhsXXpRCdWVh5EHgvuixF9XV9ZkTaOs9wIXopAjEqu6oIYu8nmvhuj_7WpUBHYTCrgDv2fvAAk84fOAa4t7AF2sh8TjRGXWLBe3tkk%3D)

body:
If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell in November, please read this email.
#
There’s less than 4 weeks until our primary.
**If we want a real Democrat with the same values & priorities as the people of Kentucky to represent us **→ we need to make sure Charles is our candidate.
**If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell on Election Day** → we need to make sure Charles is our candidate.
**And if we want to make sure voters choose Charles this primary** → we need to seriously increase our fundraising numbers so we can expand our grassroots voter outreach programs.
**[Will you chip in $3 to our Defeat Mitch McConnell Fund? We’ll put down your name as one of the early supporters who helped launch this political movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17643584/201583551/-1771280060?refcode=em20200527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBlMjUwMS00MGEwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eu5ldV7zvmZrJ5M9J1smcZPqVSsfdLPzArVFitfiA-s=)**

**Here’s the truth:** We’re relying on grassroots donors like you to help us raise the funds we need to make this all possible.
We don’t get million-dollar checks from our friends in the fossil fuel industry or have billionaire buddies who can help us out.
We’re a grassroots campaign that believes the only way we can truly put power into the hands of people is if we build a movement with people.
That means we count every dollar bill you give us. We treasure the spare change that folks are able to chip in. **When we put our $1, $5, $19.27 (our average online donation) contributions together — we can be more powerful than any billionaire or special interest check. **

clean_body: If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell in November, please read this email. There’s less than 4 weeks until our primary. If we want a real Democrat with the same values & priorities as the people of Kentucky to represent us → we need to make sure Charles is our candidate. If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell on Election Day → we need to make sure Charles is our candidate. And if we want to make sure voters choose Charles this primary → we need to seriously increase our fundraising numbers so we can expand our grassroots voter outreach programs. = = = Here’s the truth: We’re relying on grassroots donors like you to help us raise the funds we need to make this all possible. We don’t get million-dollar checks from our friends in the fossil fuel industry or have billionaire buddies who can help us out. We’re a grassroots campaign that believes the only way we can truly put power into the hands of people is if we build a movement with people. That means we count every dollar bill you give us. We treasure the spare change that folks are able to chip in. When we put our $1, $5, $19.27 (our average online donation) contributions together — we can be more powerful than any billionaire or special interest check. = = Together, Team Booker **=** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Karl Rove
subject: Dems have their eyes on more than just the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The 2020 elections will likely be the most important elections of our lives. But it isn't just the White House that's up for grabs. We must think about the Senate too. Make a 5x-matched donation today to show your support for President Trump and his Republican Senate Majority.
Friend,

The 2020 elections will likely be the most important elections of our lives. But it isn't just the White House that Democrats are trying to take.

**Republicans have 23 Senate seats to defend. If we lose just four of them, we lose the Senate and the opportunity to Keep America Great.** President Trump is relying on us to keep his allies in office. It's go time and we need supporters to step up now. clean_body: The 2020 elections will likely be the most important elections of our lives. But it isn't just the White House that's up for grabs. We must think about the Senate too. Make a 5x-matched donation today to show your support for President Trump and his Republican Senate Majority. Friend, The 2020 elections will likely be the most important elections of our lives. But it isn't just the White House that Democrats are trying to take. Republicans have 23 Senate seats to defend. If we lose just four of them, we lose the Senate and the opportunity to Keep America Great. President Trump is relying on us to keep his allies in office. It's go time and we need supporters to step up now. == Democrats in Congress have shown that they have little interest in working with the President, even if their inaction comes at the expense of the American people. You deserve better. We need leaders who will be tough on China, won't sacrifice American jobs to pass the Green New Deal, and will put the needs of every American family first. But President Trump and his Republican allies need your full support; otherwise, everything we've fought so hard to accomplish could be gone. We must take action now to prevent a liberal takeover. name: Ted Cruz
subject: even Beto…
body:
Friend, What a month it has been for our nation and the Lone Star State! Amid a worldwide pandemic, national Democrats are ratcheting up their efforts to flip the Senate blue. They're directing millions of dollars into red states with the dream of turning them solidly blue. And this past month, we saw them train their eyes on Texas like never before. That's right I don't know if you saw the news, but even my 2018 opponent Beto O'Rourke hosted an event with Joe Biden on the importance of flipping Texas. They really think they can do it. And to tell you the truth, Friend, they could get exactly what they want if we don't step in and stand in their way. That's why I'm emailing you today to ask that you join John Cornyn's efforts to keep Texas red and that you do it quickly. He's leading an operation to defend our values unlike anything Texas has ever seen, but if he doesn't make his MASSIVE End of Month goal, everything he's working towards may be placed in jeopardy. **[Will you chip in $25 now before the deadline hits?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-ga7PKWj3EMCXfdAcjyle8AcUq9PPA3fZOGFOwhOR6M7ecYUmyLwg5oszDiytnTx8ymq4QOvVKwJU7cFkvSds-6QyuX810iInGJ1Iy57jyx0dzKJS4HDtJQV73tkgP48PZAUwbsWOOEy-UyvV8IQj3x4d83MQQFmgFwyBhJsc1L0o3VivmQCcmWTNEnNGKy8w0cwBMwIXMovxnOZRkJw9EvtaWt7Q93MnFSaPW3aY6BnNfKR2-lQ3NOQJR9Xi1lnqnAIzE6mmokBVCDm2Gg0CftnFQvdr6sQoQ==&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==)** **May Fundraising Deadline** End of month goal: **SHORT** [**KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-ga7PKWj3EMCXfdAcjyle8AcUq9PPA3fZOGFOwhOR6M7ecYUmyLwg5oszDiytnTx8ymq4QOvVKwJU7cFkvSds-6QyuX810iInGJ1Iy57jyx0dzKJS4HDtJQV73tkgP48PZAUwbsWOOEy-UyvV8IQj3x4d83MQQFmgFwyBhJsc1L0o3VivmQCcmWTNEnNGKy8w0cwBMwIXMovxnOZRkJw9EvtaWt7Q93MnFSaPW3aY6BnNfKR2-lQ3NOQJR9Xi1lnqnAIzE6mmokBVCDm2Gg0Cfv6WjE2J95iCQ==&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==) Friend, I've been speaking with my Senate colleagues about what's been going on lately, and we all agree: **[If red-blooded conservatives like you fail to stand up for what you believe, the Far-Left will walk to victory.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-ga7PKWj3EMCXfdAcjyle8AcUq9PPA3fZOGFOwhOR6M7ecYUmyLwg5oszDiytnTx8ymq4QOvVKwJU7cFkvSds-6QyuX810iInGJ1Iy57jyx0dzKJS4HDtJQV73tkgP48PZAUwbsWOOEy-UyvV8IQj3x4d83MQQFmgFwyBhJsc1L0o3VivmQCcmWTNEnNGKy8w0cwBMwIXMovxnOZRkJw9EvtaWt7Q93MnFSaPW3aY6BnNfKR2-lQ3NOQJR9Xi1lnqnAIzE6mmokBVCDm2Gg0CfuxFCS2aXh6xQ==&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==)** We can't give up this fight we can't give up on Texas. That's why I need you to stop what you're doing RIGHT NOW and chip in anything you can to my friend John Cornyn. He needs to meet his goal if a red Texas stands any chance. **[Will you do that for me, Friend?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-ga7PKWj3EMCXfdAcjyle8AcUq9PPA3fZOGFOwhOR6M7ecYUmyLwg5oszDiytnTx8ymq4QOvVKwJU7cFkvSds-6QyuX810iInGJ1Iy57jyx0dzKJS4HDtJQV73tkgP48PZAUwbsWOOEy-UyvV8IQj3x4d83MQQFmgFwyBhJsc1L0o3VivmQCcmWTNEnNGKy8w0cwBMwIXMovxnOZRkJw9EvtaWt7Q93MnFSaPW3aY6BnNfKR2-lQ3NOQJR9Xi1lnqnAIzE6mmokBVCDm2Gg0CfvGYD3HNVskyQ==&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==)** Ted Cruz Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-l6EmTLcpsA-NYMn7E9LrOK8xNarxsRZBIE2zeo_g8vg_5MjU4XJsS3WEXCue4dKpAckqWQ1xnOLuSgsR4jMtlHrqXKx-qpW9McXC5WugELv9pBJBMOXlqY=&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-s2Rr3hEKVPNa39knA53euCA5EA6STFsfMf2MEs1wo5egpPCyXyho1u5tSZkyjLOfSWJSv1Q6XsHcbkyH6KffH3rrnnOS-UChTLml73XTPb2&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-l6EmTLcpsA-ZTma2vKtu4CWcI5aQkUM4TtWqgj9Ap-nuMnv78A7rNhRAFCftsUXDwzAZaKru-v1w15bjf7mN-ktElfdvkyrpWaekJtuplAvLJY3Wwr0ZZWKXzVAPf7ehQ==&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015cwgoVEw6F0UsjNaog-ezAubuKPPJrt7UfUQmuGAMZruyxBhkzI8-gQQAJRCfnV8f8AmapRPT2AzvhNk8OWH2OVDMMA1GGS9g2NQLiJT3DeKpGyMdNHFCjMgf28OsI10mAuPlIupfu34Zxh75M3C_QeOPLnUL1TTUwP0DBBzt4yt8Uu14enCJhalvaWS4s6_a1T0Hs1tzzPKUnb2TfWuDOw9eWUK6mjMlYSvsBviY5WG3Q22rQsm1WOoSASbqJ1o-BgOXq77bCFeYYBvPo4QhZ5bACpWXUak6lDq3t9S-jTXVgSdZiVwpQ==&c=tXY85ZCqUpIbp-e9CZZpKiXPxV1CM7ndcT5OMDFMknPSWJQQjaxU3A==&ch=lmG6PwtXkLnYkcyVfNAYLnTLMmCs2Ljt-h57TlFMM2avRNqEtpA9pA==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax deductible.

clean_body: Friend, What a month it has been for our nation and the Lone Star State! Amid a worldwide pandemic, national Democrats are ratcheting up their efforts to flip the Senate blue. They're directing millions of dollars into red states with the dream of turning them solidly blue. And this past month, we saw them train their eyes on Texas like never before. That's right I don't know if you saw the news, but even my 2018 opponent Beto O'Rourke hosted an event with Joe Biden on the importance of flipping Texas. They really think they can do it. And to tell you the truth, Friend, they could get exactly what they want if we don't step in and stand in their way. That's why I'm emailing you today to ask that you join John Cornyn's efforts to keep Texas red and that you do it quickly. He's leading an operation to defend our values unlike anything Texas has ever seen, but if he doesn't make his MASSIVE End of Month goal, everything he's working towards may be placed in jeopardy. == May Fundraising Deadline End of month goal: SHORT == Friend, I've been speaking with my Senate colleagues about what's been going on lately, and we all agree: == We can't give up this fight we can't give up on Texas. That's why I need you to stop what you're doing RIGHT NOW and chip in anything you can to my friend John Cornyn. He needs to meet his goal if a red Texas stands any chance. == Ted Cruz Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on == and == that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn == up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our == and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. subject: Checking our records

body:
| | | |

---
Hi Peter, I just had a quick meeting with my campaign manager, Ethan, to go over our budget numbers and we still have a little ways to go to meet our fundraising goal by May 29. We are reaching out for your support because **_we 'd love to add you to our list of grassroots supporters and we don't see you on the list yet!_** **Right now, our campaign has over 850 grassroots donors, while my opponent looks to fund his campaign with a privileged group of wealthy donors and lobbyists. **My campaign _ and _my time in office will be spent responding to the needs of the people of my district, not passing an agenda that benefits only wealthy special interests. We're so close that these grassroots donations will help us cross the finish line. **We only need 141 more donors to reach 1,000 grassroots donors** \- I hope you'll join this team. _If you can, $5 or $10 would make a real difference_. Thanks so much for the support. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PXRUwAM7HuLilgDHGI7atPBQRG6ZPPfuPink6Io7irg=/fOXm7Xr-1WgyrS08xvEy9SmILsEkVV4Yy492Tm6S7Cw=?refcode=deadline2) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PXRUwAM7HuLilgDHGI7atPBQRG6ZPPfuPink6Io7irg=/iE2W_-mNCSOwU6ZlOAeNGndUXMKx-gF0xLbIblAnCSg=?refcode=deadline2&amount=5) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PXRUwAM7HuLilgDHGI7atPBQRG6ZPPfuPink6Io7irg=/iE2W_-mNCSOwU6ZlOAeNGndUXMKx-gF0xLbIblAnCSg=?refcode=deadline2&amount=10) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PXRUwAM7HuLilgDHGI7atPBQRG6ZPPfuPink6Io7irg=/iE2W_-mNCSOwU6ZlOAeNGndUXMKx-gF0xLbIblAnCSg=?refcode=deadline2)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NASA: We’re Going Back to the Moon, and Beyond
body:
"Our nation is on the verge of launching NASA astronauts to the International Space Station on a commercial American rocket and spacecraft..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1dd1cf4320&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **NASA: We’re Going Back to the Moon, and Beyond**

“Our nation is on the verge of launching NASA astronauts to the International Space Station on a commercial American rocket and spacecraft—a historic mission,” NASA Administrator Jim Bridenstine writes in _USA Today_.

“NASA has a bold plan to quickly and sustainably explore more of the moon than ever before under the Artemis program. Even as we shift focus to the moon, NASA remains committed to supporting a space economy in low-Earth orbit for research, crew training and more.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=63d79cf8d3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Of course the Trump administration is playing tough with the media—because the media has played tough with him before he was even elected. Nearly every question asked in the briefing room is usually in the loaded construction of, ‘As you know, things are terrible, and it’s your fault, care to comment?’ McEnany has decided to hit back,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3773397791&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Democrats and virtually every journalist in the Washington media are fond of saying things like _Nobody wants the shutdown to last forever_ and _Everybody wants the economy to go back to what it was_. But just as when they insist that _Everyone believes in securing the Southern border_ , there's no real indication that they're being honest,” Eddie Scarry writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6972d7cda3&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Most Medicare recipients will have access to prescription plans next year that limit their copays for insulin to no more than $35 a month, potentially saving hundreds of dollars, the Trump administration announced Tuesday,” [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b30990661&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22c16368f9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e58cf8740&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ba30babcf4)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are threatening major cuts to the Postal Service, which millions of American families rely upon.

**I want Arizonans to hear me loud and clear when I say I will always fight for our Postal Service. **

The Postal Service is an absolutely essential public service that keeps our communities connected, our commerce growing, and our elections safe.

[**Will you add your name to my petition calling on Congress to protect the Postal Service from Trump and McConnell 's proposed cuts?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JXgCm6qiN0NrW7aPsjsNeUJisDJgU2H3ZrCXkv097kI=/0l8Cb_pZgQXFf-KV5eBEQxjZanBqPJh00sStnxAKV6I=)

Thank you for defending our Postal Service,

\-- _Greg_

**The National Republican Congressional Committee just named Claudia a 2020 Young Gun!** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1021a85951c344b8b8f3cc8f355b4925&_e=ppTFHGxNSdgP4i0UmNKeqyNAhAezFx-kpwLb5lIsgLHTomR1JTeKhbSCj16wFKZ4BoTW1mHfrTJ3PpZzQv5CZxQdyT11WfwvnhkTrddmF4PQD36r9YneDXx10TVD8brhYdoH-AyLai870hNTotkvGk_IR3MaYyqIFpGJ0IufjoqwpQeeqjF2D-g1LFCKCV65FbZy2dPtMcqKfm3sS_fY4eAO1Pt-UnwDuicmsLVu778-IacSV6-VhL-RPoepu9p3FfCU7nRcVJUXfJXnUbt25i0wWc827G1UUyOFkoHn7LxLeyLSOLsbqkqyX0vDqU8nX-TnFHM3FJUAyVElfRhx9x0gohAe1LBU7wXEnNNZd_fCsDPyQV40e7GGPKNkaVeu5OUVp7Nkwwzs1b9hBJNnncqpIaAd8WhQB0FJ0ZP3U4nlLQLJ-6mfz_yshqCKT4pR) Not sure what it means to be a Young Gun?
**The NRCC’s Young Guns program is designed to identify and support candidates in the top races across the country who have established a “clear path to victory.” _Claudia is the only Republican in the race to earn this distinction. _**
Peter, Claudia didn’t achieve this herself. This is a direct result of the hard work and dedication our grassroots supporters like you have demonstrated in the fight to take back NY-22.
As excited as we are of this accomplishment, we can’t hang our hats on this. We’re still in the trenches, and we need to keep the ball rolling until we win on June 23rd and on November 3rd. name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: In honor of Mental Health Awareness Month...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
May is Mental Health Awareness Month. With the uncertainty surrounding COVID-19, this time may feel especially overwhelming and anxiety-ridden.

That's why organizations like the National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) are so important. The nation’s largest grassroots mental health organization, NAMI offers support, fights stigma, educates the public, and advocates for policies that support people with mental illness and their families.

If you can, will you consider making a donation to NAMI today?

With everything going on, it’s easy to put a singular focus on our physical health. However, mental health and wellbeing are just as important. It's vital that you continue to make time for yourself, check in on loved ones, and remember that it's okay to not feel okay.

If you are feeling isolated or overwhelmed, here are five useful suggestions from the CDC:

1. Take time to PAUSE. Take deep breaths. Notice how you feel. Meditate.

2. Make sure to take BREAKS from COVID-19-related news.

3. Cut out time for proper SLEEP and EXERCISE -- even if that's just a walk around the block.

4. REACH OUT and stay connected with friends and family, either virtually or at a social distance.

5. SEEK HELP when you need it. You can call the Los Angeles County Department of Mental Health Access Center’s 24/7 Helpline at (800) 854-7771 or text "LA" to 741741. Likewise, you can call the Disaster Distress Helpline at 1-800-985-5990, or text TalkWithUs to 66746

For further information, you can find NAMI's comprehensive COVID-19 Resource and Information Guide, here.

Thank you,

-- Team Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/fxexECj4wl3LJ9fzL_TMCG6ZI4I0NaJ-A98uAD5bt5Y=/gEmw5vZkqXjr1kA8-nLlnKsW19ZJw24aeL5hyvQDlYI=.

subject: Be the first to see our new video ad
body:
I wanted you to be the first to see our first introductory web ad that tells you a bit about who I really I am, and why I'm running for State House. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/new-video-ad-5-27-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=5fcd378dac&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=43218bcc4c&e=4f010155df)
---
| Friends,

The outpouring of support we have received in our campaign for State House has been truly incredible. From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

People who live, work, and visit Texas recognize how important it is for us to fight for the future of the Lone Star State. They understand that Texas is a bastion of free market enterprise that has allowed so many people including myself to live the American Dream. I'm ready to take on the career politicians, rebuild our economy, and defend our Texas values.

I wanted you to be the first to see [our first introductory web ad that tells you a bit about who I really I am, and why I'm running for State House.](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a40b2505e4&e=4f010155df) Please have a look and then consider sharing it on social media yourself.

In addition, [please consider donating to our campaign.](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e35d497e37&e=4f010155df) Asking for your financial assistance is never easy, but Democrats and special interest groups from around the country will be flooding money into this race to ensure we aren't successful. They know we can win and will stop at nothing to prevent us from winning.

[By clicking here](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=89c694cd14&e=4f010155df), you can contribute $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 to keep our campaign in a strong position for victory.

For Texas,
---
|
---
| Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for Texas House District 113

Thata€TMs what happens when millions of Americans are being lied to by anti-Trump attack ads funded by the Radical Left, and the FAKE NEWS MEDIA covers for Joe Biden to sink the Presidenta€TMs re-election. Friend --

body:
Hundreds of people joined Republican candidate for United states Senate Hirsh Singh in chanting "Shame on Phil Murphy" at Point Pleasant in New... | | | Dear Friend,

_**Let's be real.**_

We'll never stop calling out BS, whether it comes from the fake news media or "Democrats-in-Disguise"(RINO wannabes) trying to infiltrate the Republican U.S. Senate Primary!

If you missed yesterday's “Freedom March of New Jersey” (where I put **both** on notice!), [check out my speech here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9660d13faf&e=3e017fab0f).

We've got the establishment running scared! _**Time to surge.**_

---
| |
# Hirsh Singh Calls for Opening NJ and Exposes Democrat Infiltration of GOP

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Hundreds of people joined Republican candidate for United States Senate Hirsh Singh in chanting "Shame on Phil Murphy" at Point Pleasant in New Jersey, which was the site of the 'Freedom March of NJ' on Memorial Day.

A number of speakers and supporters gathered at the site of the protest to demand that New Jersey be opened immediately, but the star of the show was easily Hirsh Singh, who enthused the crowd into joining him as they chanted slogans against the state's Governor. Hirsh Singh pointed out that quarantine was for the sick and not the healthy. His point that everything the media reported was about fear while America was the “land of the free” because it was the “home of the brave” struck a chord with the crowd that had assembled for the rally.

Earlier in the event, organizers took away Hirsh Singh's speaking slot and gave it to his opponent, Rikin Mehta. The move backfired on both the organizers as well as Mehta when Mehta's lackluster performance ended with him being exposed as a Democrat and member of Big Pharma.

Mehta's history includes voting for Obama, supporting Obamacare, getting a political appointment from Democrat mayors and getting on the ballot for this year's polls by using Democrat Party operators to circulate his petition. Mehta has also headed pharmaceutical behemoth Pfizer's regulatory policy, which includes selling abortion pills camouflaged as ulcer medications. This policy of Pfizer has been termed "Pills for Mail Order Abortion" by its critics and has angered pro-life conservatives.

Pro-life voters around the state have sworn to defeat Mehta and vote for Hirsh Singh. Singh has been a staunch conservative all his life and supported Donald Trump right from the start in June 2015. He is the only candidate in the U.S. Senate race who has never supported a Democrat or been a Democrat himself. Another opponent of Singh, Tricia Flanagan, donated the maximum amount of money to the Democrat Governor as well as Presidential candidate Bill Richardson.

Hirsh Singh stated during his speech that he would win the election and put an end to the career of Cory Booker.
###

**The Singh for Senate Press Team**

name: Matt Ciepielowski
subject: Failure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
A Republican House Majority relies on this seat and there is no margin for error. The media is billing this as the "Marquee fight" to watch in November. It's a toss-up and and a top-target -- meaning it can go either way and the Democrats are already organizing to attack.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNFmY-BJF_Q3m75P4vHHp6u2WmnH0KfXXAKzgo3Lqgn7wnOHruE4PKovv1AZHEpSY_EkW2u-tkUqktdmECIDpu5X9UtfzQ5QrI9cxXK50z0tvMASbq3Xdhe4hCu17xKFQ5f-XGMCrxhoLwfrwGlf5cilrJijt86vVmt7OUciQunj6vbrji9pvhtjHfBsOKUNMr1ItjUDWHNv9hfqhHrGZ59QJRJ79cROTcWAAb8FbPvcISgjpBmCVsJlRJbdI2IpNyOD_RnHn0yDYdB9b5F_i8gnEmYGA6RKoEjYpP2fBPH-GvL0fYCXYfXNffj_6iwaHI7Qr7BDS90w6wWFFdJiU2vzAQxL4uyHOl4=&c=hvVuKTqM1_399_HuMxCBb4kgDRhe5zZ1yYMfZ8xqFsQWVdTunNUv3A==&ch=C1LB5FkHSJD5kQlhppnRPT66S0KoXMHCRLs7hp0_mY_fvKBQB8q8fA==)
Hey Friend, my name is Matt and I'm the campaign manager here on Team Steel. I'm reaching out because we are just 4 days away from our critical May campaign deadline and we're behind where we need to be. To say it straight: **We have to reach our fundraising goal. There is no room for failure.** [**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE MAJORITY -- CHIP IN BY 11:59 PM 5/31**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNFmY-BJF_Q3m75P4vHHp6u2WmnH0KfXXAKzgo3Lqgn7wnOHruE4PKovv1AZHEpSY_EkW2u-tkUqktdmECIDpu5X9UtfzQ5QrI9cxXK50z0tvMASbq3Xdhe4hCu17xKFQ5f-XGMCrxhoLwfrwGlf5cilrJijt86vVmt7OUciQunj6vbrji9pvhtjHfBsOKUNMr1ItjUDWHNv9hfqhHrGZ59QJRJ79cROTcWAAb8FbPvcISgjpBmCVsJlRJbdI2IpNyOD_RnHn0yDYdB9b5F_i8gnEmYGA6RKoEjYpP2fBPH-GvL0fYCXYfXNffj_6iwaHI7Qr7BDS90w6wWFFdJiU2vzAQxL4uyHOl4=&c=hvVuKTqM1_399_HuMxCBb4kgDRhe5zZ1yYMfZ8xqFsQWVdTunNUv3A==&ch=C1LB5FkHSJD5kQlhppnRPT66S0KoXMHCRLs7hp0_mY_fvKBQB8q8fA==)
**4X MATCH IS _ACTIVE_** Here's why:_
Last election, Michael Bloomberg spent $4.4+ million to buy this seat.__
Last quarter, our opponent raised nearly a million dollars, outraising us by DOUBLE.
And just a few weeks ago, a Pelosi aligned PAC announced over $3 million in ads to come after us._

Our game plan is simple: grow our grassroots network, spread our conservative message, take on our liberal opponent and win in November. Meeting our goal ensures we have the resources needed to do just that. Falling short means we won't have the means to fight against the Left's attacks. [**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE MAJORITY -- CHIP IN BY 11:59 PM 5/31**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNFmY-BJF_Q3m75P4vHHp6u2WmnH0KfXXAKzgo3Lqgn7wnOHruE4PKovv1AZHEpSY_EkW2u-tkUqktdmECIDpu5X9UtfzQ5QrI9cxXK50z0tvMASbq3Xdhe4hCu17xKFQ5f-XGMCrxhoLwfrwGlf5cilrJijt86vVmt7OUciQunj6vbrji9pvhtjHfBsOKUNMr1ItjUDWHNv9hfqhHrGZ59QJRJ79cROTcWAAb8FbPvcISgjpBmCVsJlRJbdI2IpNyOD_RnHn0yDYdB9b5F_i8gnEmYGA6RKoEjYpP2fBPH-GvL0fYCXYfXNffj_6iwaHI7Qr7BDS90w6wWFFdJiU2vzAQxL4uyHOl4=&c=hvVuKTqM1_399_HuMxCBb4kgDRhe5zZ1yYMfZ8xqFsQWVdTunNUv3A==&ch=C1LB5FkHSJD5kQlhppnRPT66S0KoXMHCRLs7hp0_mY_fvKBQB8q8fA==)
**4X MATCH IS _ACTIVE_** A Republican House Majority relies on this seat and there is no margin for error. The media is billing this as the "Marquee fight" to watch in November. It's a toss-up and and a top-target -- meaning it can go either way and the Democrats are already organizing to attack.

This seat was only recently flipped blue by our opponent, Nancy Pelosi, and Bloomberg's millions in 2018. And right now, they're scared. Our opponent is on the DCCC's list of most vulnerable Democrats _and right now we have the momentum to flip it back red ...._

[**That 's why I have to ask: can you make a 4X match contribution of any size to flip this seat from blue to red?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNFmY-BJF_Q3m75P4vHHp6u2WmnH0KfXXAKzgo3Lqgn7wnOHruE4PKovv1AZHEpSY_EkW2u-tkUqktdmECIDpu5X9UtfzQ5QrI9cxXK50z0tvMASbq3Xdhe4hCu17xKFQ5f-XGMCrxhoLwfrwGlf5cilrJijt86vVmt7OUciQunj6vbrji9pvhtjHfBsOKUNMr1ItjUDWHNv9hfqhHrGZ59QJRJ79cROTcWAAb8FbPvcISgjpBmCVsJlRJbdI2IpNyOD_RnHn0yDYdB9b5F_i8gnEmYGA6RKoEjYpP2fBPH-GvL0fYCXYfXNffj_6iwaHI7Qr7BDS90w6wWFFdJiU2vzAQxL4uyHOl4=&c=hvVuKTqM1_399_HuMxCBb4kgDRhe5zZ1yYMfZ8xqFsQWVdTunNUv3A==&ch=C1LB5FkHSJD5kQlhppnRPT66S0KoXMHCRLs7hp0_mY_fvKBQB8q8fA==)

Michelle Steel has dedicated her life to providing quick, common-sense reforms to all Californians. She's pledged to oppose new taxes and tax increases and even led the fight to return millions to California taxpayers. Now she's ready to take that fight to Congress -- but she needs our help!

It won't be easy, but it is crucial we do everything we can to keep pushing forward. This race is much bigger than one seat -- whoever wins will determine who controls the House Majority.

[**Can we count on you?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNFmY-BJF_Q3m75P4vHHp6u2WmnH0KfXXAKzgo3Lqgn7wnOHruE4PKovv1AZHEpSY_EkW2u-tkUqktdmECIDpu5X9UtfzQ5QrI9cxXK50z0tvMASbq3Xdhe4hCu17xKFQ5f-XGMCrxhoLwfrwGlf5cilrJijt86vVmt7OUciQunj6vbrji9pvhtjHfBsOKUNMr1ItjUDWHNv9hfqhHrGZ59QJRJ79cROTcWAAb8FbPvcISgjpBmCVsJlRJbdI2IpNyOD_RnHn0yDYdB9b5F_i8gnEmYGA6RKoEjYpP2fBPH-GvL0fYCXYfXNffj_6iwaHI7Qr7BDS90w6wWFFdJiU2vzAQxL4uyHOl4=&c=hvVuKTqM1_399_HuMxCBb4kgDRhe5zZ1yYMfZ8xqFsQWVdTunNUv3A==&ch=C1LB5FkHSJD5kQlhppnRPT66S0KoXMHCRLs7hp0_mY_fvKBQB8q8fA==) **4x match is active** until the end of the month, but please don't wait.

Matt Ciepielowski

[**Can you please chip in today to elect an immigrant, woman, and proud conservative and reclaim the House Majority?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvzuf-VS33476MJC3DeiSHGzUH6P6K1W7fsL0X8YQ-4MluWVCc7n6YX2N7Q7JJHcGb5l_NTO6FFVd-JCziZyeUi9eGXK1KlcNIYzvwHdIEJA4XHrnLi0WXvC-Ybi1Yb90M9ll3IlYoJxzPPl_PX8aWhxiD7hBLmqknClw0Nu-cdEVdxiRyu6W6_gk4AC8WDMbaBY0HXxuHFJ5AmpLWI7KXwGbDkGiEd_inOfOL1kBKp2E7shy7H_j3SHHcr20A0FvqK9WHJI0Kzedzs8BgbLvFrJsSlqu9fWNM4Ai2Zp3EM8NhOFCrz_vq43uRDmhPJfZEOig-snP6yFQKrxBYI7LzxMxiei_xZ0xwKvB-8--2_NdCtqqvh9oA==&c=Jc79ja9hTprZQ_enz7cS89dvZcrtTb1JCw2moEdiONVCYxyO-NkTWg==&ch=jxBeDSXVvvKyYjLNE1PWFSEXhpf0VYIjr9loNb8Cyn4QKtk1iGCkXg==)

**We are just four days until our crucial May fundraising deadline** and we can't risk coming up short. This seat was only recently flipped blue in 2018, and if we miss our shot, it'll go blue for good.

Young Kim is running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's a proud immigrant and conservative woman, who has been targeted by the Washington Democrats.... _So we have to ask:_

[**In a race as close as this, Friend, it can all change in an instant. Can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to keep us in the fight? >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvzuf-VS33476MJC3DeiSHGzUH6P6K1W7fsL0X8YQ-4MluWVCc7n6YX2N7Q7JJHcGb5l_NTO6FFVd-JCziZyeUi9eGXK1KlcNIYzvwHdIEJA4XHrnLi0WXvC-Ybi1Yb90M9ll3IlYoJxzPPl_PX8aWhxiD7hBLmqknClw0Nu-cdEVdxiRyu6W6_gk4AC8WDMbaBY0HXxuHFJ5AmpLWI7KXwGbDkGiEd_inOfOL1kBKp2E7shy7H_j3SHHcr20A0FvqK9WHJI0Kzedzs8BgbLvFrJsSlqu9fWNM4Ai2Zp3EM8NhOFCrz_vq43uRDmhPJfZEOig-snP6yFQKrxBYI7LzxMxiei_xZ0xwKvB-8--2_NdCtqqvh9oA==&c=Jc79ja9hTprZQ_enz7cS89dvZcrtTb1JCw2moEdiONVCYxyO-NkTWg==&ch=jxBeDSXVvvKyYjLNE1PWFSEXhpf0VYIjr9loNb8Cyn4QKtk1iGCkXg==)

We are facing one of the toughest races in the nation and for good reason.... _This seat was only recently flipped blue by Nancy Pelosi and our self-funded opponent. Whoever wins will determine who controls the House Majority._

**BUT** POLITICO has this race rated as a toss-up and it could go either way. We even won our Primary, beating our liberal incumbent opponent, defying all the odds.

That's why we have a target on our backs. With only four days until our critical May fundraising deadline, it's critical we don't fall behind. [**All donations made by Sunday at MIDNIGHT will go directly towards this important goal.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvzuf-VS33476MJC3DeiSHGzUH6P6K1W7fsL0X8YQ-4MluWVCc7n6YX2N7Q7JJHcGb5l_NTO6FFVd-JCziZyeUi9eGXK1KlcNIYzvwHdIEJA4XHrnLi0WXvC-Ybi1Yb90M9ll3IlYoJxzPPl_PX8aWhxiD7hBLmqknClw0Nu-cdEVdxiRyu6W6_gk4AC8WDMbaBY0HXxuHFJ5AmpLWI7KXwGbDkGiEd_inOfOL1kBKp2E7shy7H_j3SHHcr20A0FvqK9WHJI0Kzedzs8BgbLvFrJsSlqu9fWNM4Ai2Zp3EM8NhOFCrz_vq43uRDmhPJfZEOig-snP6yFQKrxBYI7LzxMxiei_xZ0xwKvB-8--2_NdCtqqvh9oA==&c=Jc79ja9hTprZQ_enz7cS89dvZcrtTb1JCw2moEdiONVCYxyO-NkTWg==&ch=jxBeDSXVvvKyYjLNE1PWFSEXhpf0VYIjr9loNb8Cyn4QKtk1iGCkXg==)

Thank you,

Team Young [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvzuf-VS33476MJC3DeiSHGzUH6P6K1W7fsL0X8YQ-4MluWVCc7n6YX2N7Q7JJHcGb5l_NTO6FFVd-JCziZyeUi9eGXK1KlcNIYzvwHdIEJA4XHrnLi0WXvC-Ybi1Yb90M9ll3IlYoJxzPPl_PX8aWhxiD7hBLmqknClw0Nu-cdEVdxiRyu6W6_gk4AC8WDMbaBY0HXxuHFJ5AmpLWI7KXwGbDkGiEd_inOfOL1kBKp2E7shy7H_j3SHHcr20A0FvqK9WHJI0Kzedzs8BgbLvFrJsSlqu9fWNM4Ai2Zp3EM8NhOFCrz_vq43uRDmhPJfZEOig-snP6yFQKrxBYI7LzxMxiei_xZ0xwKvB-8--2_NdCtqqvh9oA==&c=Jc79ja9hTprZQ_enz7cS89dvZcrtTb1JCw2moEdiONVCYxyO-NkTWg==&ch=jxBeDSXVvvKyYjLNE1PWFSEXhpf0VYIjr9loNb8Cyn4QKtk1iGCkXg==)

name: PragerU
subject: A golden opportunity for our values
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==) Fellow American,
We hope that you and your families are safe and well.
At PragerU, we're working harder than ever (from home!) to undo the damage done to our nation by producing and distributing short, digestible, educational videos that bring the conservative message to younger generations.
**PragerU has America's single largest megaphone directly into millennials and Gen Z, and during this difficult time, we are working to be a part of the solution by educating viewers about founding principles, timeless truths, and American exceptionalism.**
These principles have sustained us through hard times, and have made us stronger as a nation. They will do so again.
But, to be completely honest with you, we've been getting troubling calls from some of our most generous supporters. _Because of the recent downturn brought on by the coronavirus crisis, many of our longtime supporters are saying they will not be able to help with a significant gift this year._
**[We fear that the important work we have accomplished educating younger generations about conservative principles might be in jeopardy, which is why we're asking for your immediate gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==)** [**Give Now**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==) **PragerU videos have been viewed more than 3.3 BILLION times. And survey after survey proves that we're changing hearts and minds with our educational content.**
Which might be why the better-funded left are using this opportunity to diminish our voice.
They are working right now -- in the midst of this national crisis -- to find the money to bury our ideas simply by making and marketing more left-wing content than we can produce.
But as everyone finds themselves physically trapped in their homes, it presents a golden opportunity to educate Americans who are spending more time online than ever before.
**[Can we count on your support today to help us continue our important work?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==)**
**The question is: Which side will harness this opportunity to influence hundreds of millions of young people?**
We need to be sure it's us at PragerU not the side taking advantage of this crisis as a chance to grab ever more government control.
You can help PragerU in many different ways as we weather this storm:
1. **[Give a generous gift if you are able to do so. Help us make up the gap for those who can no longer afford to give this year.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==)**

1. _Ask your friends to match your gift_ or at least share our content with them!

1. _Keep PragerU in your thoughts and prayers_. Please continue to pray for our success every week. Your encouragement will help our staff stay strong during these trying times.

This shutdown is testing us, but together we can and will succeed.
We know that, as a fellow conservative, you're alongside us in the fight for liberty, whether you can give financially or not.
**[But if you are able, I hope and pray that we can count on your generous gift today to help us continue our important work.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==)** [**Give Now**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6dhAbnCZ0jRzcSZwGVkDhrnSAkVNv2MWTjWtB_fVk1xBH5CCvoxFiyGkn4ereoJij2uoyBvkaRh_v1MGBULsuO6krGZ4TFSDyH67par8qAlSsLiMp1h36wq_FxS6M66x-jD34kC5U_mBlrd3LuqY-SD-TTKRh8Q36ZUp90NzB7MSQpaMKFhQc3lQyv3OhkIDTig0a8HPpV8obmf6EfoJc74AR6DXOXM744_eAYzCjtDeFSLnL_b2ccjPjw-_rEvzuUV7j1bUAM=&c=EF6eiwC1VsbsrdFiaIr0KJoV769EWJWiCUqgsaXgXLnDVkIZDhM-7w==&ch=l_NJxnGBNsjrjWHWzxjL--vUL9doU1rDr3MfBywSpZ-yY0xE0MIfEQ==) Thank you in advance for anything you can do, and God bless you and your family.

Marissa Streit CEO, PragerU

clean_body: == Fellow American, We hope that you and your families are safe and well. At PragerU, we're working harder than ever (from home!) to undo the damage done to our nation by producing and distributing short, digestible, educational videos that bring the conservative message to younger generations. PragerU has America's single largest megaphone directly into millennials and Gen Z, and during this difficult time, we are working to be a part of the solution by educating viewers about founding principles, timeless truths, and American exceptionalism. These principles have sustained us through hard times, and have made us stronger as a nation. They will do so again. But, to be completely honest with you, we've been getting troubling calls from some of our most generous supporters. Because of the recent downturn brought on by the coronavirus crisis, many of our longtime supporters are saying they will not be able to help with a significant gift this year. == == PragerU videos have been viewed more than 3.3 BILLION times. And survey after survey proves that we're changing hearts and minds with our educational content. Which might be why the better-funded left are using this opportunity to diminish our voice. They are working right now -- in the midst of this national crisis -- to find the money to bury our ideas simply by making and marketing more left-wing content than we can produce. But as everyone finds themselves physically trapped in their homes, it presents a golden opportunity to educate Americans who are spending more time online than ever before. == The question is: Which side will harness this opportunity to influence hundreds of millions of young people? We need to be sure it's us at PragerU not the side taking advantage of this crisis as a chance to grab ever more government control. You can help PragerU in many different ways as we weather this storm: 1. == 1. Ask your friends to match your gift or at least share our content with them! 1. Keep PragerU in your thoughts and prayers. Please continue to pray for our success every week. Your encouragement will help our staff stay strong during these trying times. This shutdown is testing us, but together we can and will succeed. We know that, as a fellow conservative, you're alongside us in the fight for liberty, whether you can give financially or not. == == Thank you in advance for anything you can do, and God bless you and your family. **The Voter Protection Project has got it right. We ONLY have the chance to flip the Senate if we do the work to mobilize our grassroots base _NOW!_**
My campaign is within striking distance of sending Lindsey packing and flipping one of the seats needed to take back the Senate.
We're doing this by meeting voters where they are: online, on the phones, and with targeted ads on social media, **but all of this takes resources.**
Peter, we need you on our team. [**That 's why I'm hoping I can count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today!**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d046c/72412298/4c9ac299/610551c0/2485573138/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfaGFycmlzb25zcGxpdGVvbV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUyN19IYXJyaXNvblN1cnJfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_harrisonspliteom_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200527_HarrisonSurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+hoping+I+can+coun&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200527_HarrisonSurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200527_HarrisonSurr_U1_X1")
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d046c/72412298/4c9ac299/610551c3/2485573138/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfaGFycmlzb25zcGxpdGVvbV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUyN19IYXJyaXNvblN1cnJfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_harrisonspliteom_may?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200527_HarrisonSurr_U1_X1&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200527_HarrisonSurr_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200527_HarrisonSurr_U1_X1")
