name: Emily Rybak
subject: 13 DAYS LEFT! Kathy Landing for Congress Election Day Volunteering!
body:
Good Afternoon,

My name is Emily Rybak, and I am proud to serve as campaign manager for Kathy Landing’s campaign for Congress. I thank you for all you have done thus far to best position Kathy to win the Republican Primary in less than two weeks!

I am writing today to ask you to please join our incredible team of Election Day volunteers.

There are three activities that we need additional help with on Election Day - Tuesday, June 9th:

Sign Placements: The night before or in the early morning of Election Day, our team will be placing signs 200+ feet from the entrances of the polling locations. Since there are nearly 200 precincts across the district, we could really use your help with placing signs! If you are able to do so, we would be glad to drop off some signs to you closer to Election Day for you to put at your precinct and others within the area!

Sign Waving: At your precinct, or another precinct in the area, we would greatly appreciate you waving signs 200+ feet away from the entrance of the polling location. Sign waving is an amazing way to show our support and to remind voters as they drive into the location to vote for Kathy Landing on Election Day! Whether you can sign wave for an hour or all day, we greatly appreciate your help with this effort!

Precinct results: When the polls close at 7:00 PM, poll workers will pull the results from the machines and tape them on the entrance doors of the polling locations around 7:15 PM. Taking pictures of the results and sending them to our team will help us expedite the result-gathering process and let our team know the election result before any news outlet reports it.

To assist with any or all of the aforementioned activities means the world to Kathy and our team. Again, whether it’s an hour or all day, any effort you can help us with will be a tremendous help. Please reply to this email with your desired volunteer activity or call me at 843-333-3195, preferably before Friday, June 5th, so we can have our organization finalized properly.

Again, thank you so much for your continued support of Kathy and thank you in advance for your help to win back South Carolina’s First Congressional District!

On to victory,

Emily Rybak
843-333-3195
\--

Emily Rybak
Campaign Manager

[emily@kathylanding.com](mailto:emily@kathylanding.com)
843-333-3195

name: Darin LaHood
subject: Will you be one of the 1,000?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Democrats aren’t treating the COVID-19 crisis as a crisis. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b3dd54a2bc7d497bb404ee1e2bd5c565&_e=2YD83uDt36TM9OXSBFtiTNcS-YYaijquLMo9ZwiYQYWqpd9WUScTpKnhwYw1qfqKN3TXA0u1pzdeKtLNZk-qcNUwJ1j7Lnd_9orY6zpU6l0bAQQtwYPwENESFRPwa5SvbASEuIBbWHJlq-2l4lfGimJ1yj-n9AiVBiKUSlzBFsC4pF3XEcrXWAK_MURSvHeYFpHr8C-J2mjBH1JBrScHhAFUmifrKJF1eQh-LAu3oOriNpEwFxNTOmBJG195nrjImh9Mf_AxztwNrtZuG7YxUiydIIyvBu7-AErAU_mIMBol2yPbc0mV4l-E39IpZhYKLNLakQsuPwG_mAB0v3nGHA4UCX8J0D4x8mqiWGTXImPUPJsDxX9lceteXcN39bGtlyj_GfbXzkRILZplTS2MYW0u-R4MUdUtxBzxilfLZKAcIHTcHqP2ZpLe6IooTrQ6AGTxUyflsRQia3g-P1z85xfNgaPEgdsPKBt1zFX1Hww%3D) | |
---
Friend,

Democrats aren’t treating the COVID-19 crisis as a crisis.

**Led by Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden & Bernie Sanders, they’re treating this as a political opportunity. They want to pass their progressive agenda of loose election laws and stimulus checks for illegal immigrants instead of prioritizing American workers.**

They’re doing whatever they can to serve their own interests while leaving their constituents in the dust, and they’re not even attempting to hide it. **Americans deserve better.**

Friend, we’re working on something big this year – turning the House **RED** – so that our country can once again have a Congress that works for them, not the other way around.

name: Jason Yates
subject: There is something wrong in America. Act now.
body:
| | | | _"Either we have liberty to worship or we have permission to worship. It has become abundantly clear that if we settle for permission, we will never have liberty again."_ \- Pastor Stacey Shiflett, Dundalk Calvary Baptist Church in Maryland
---|---
Peter,
There is something wrong in America.
Pastors have received cease and desist letters for holding services. They have been fined and arrested for trying to meet the spiritual needs of their congregants, and in some states, parishioners have been ticketed for daring to attend a religious gathering.
This is not the America we know and love. What’s happening at this time in our history is unprecedented. Churches have been closed for months, because state and local authorities have deemed the church as “nonessential.”
**Tell your governor the Church is essential. Not because the government declares it, but because God ordained it.**
While we appreciate government officials' concern for peoples’ health, it cannot come at the expense of suspending our First Amendment right of freedom to worship over a prolonged period of time.
**Gathering together in fellowship and worship is both “essential” and guaranteed.**
[Right now, urge your governor to honor the First Amendment and defend your God-given right to worship by keeping churches essential in your state](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FctD9_sg-AXL0miQav9DganSL1Rnhh3BoqPIgmY5hF-gGump7v6TWB_GLi5fGn9VDqYHqo35fLKMP3ZUrcWtQpponA6979oaxF3LO_VIWdY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=1). Today, your most basic liberty is at risk if you don’t act to protect it.
Some governors have taken action, but until pastors and religious leaders are free to make their own decisions it’s not enough.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FctD9_sg-AXL0miQav9DganSL1Rnhh3BoqPIgmY5hF-gGump7v6TWB_GLi5fGn9VDqYHqo35fLKMP3ZUrcWtQpponA6979oaxF3LO_VIWdY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=2)
Please take action right now and urge your friends and family to defend liberty and the God-given right to worship.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=3)
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=4)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200527com01&n=9)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: HAPPENING NOW: Big Tech Election Takeover
body:
Two years ago, I faced off against Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey in a Congressional hearing room. I let every person in that room, and every person watching on television know that Twitter and collusion with the Democrat Party attempting to steal the 2018 and 2020 elections.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-377408-888711-5016518-f07308f31f-a165796074)
Patriot,

Two years ago, I faced off against Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey in a Congressional hearing room. I let every person in that room, and every person watching on television know that Twitter, in collusion with the Democrat Party was attempting to steal the 2018 and 2020 elections.

I was right! And now Big Tech is doing it again!

Last week, Twitter changed its “terms of service” with this hidden “kill clause”:

_We may suspend or terminate your account or cease providing you with all or part of the Services at any time for any or no reason._
To translate that into what Jack Dorsey really means, it’s this: “We will silence anyone who disagrees with us, anyone who supports President Donald Trump or the MAGA movement, and we will throttle all Republican candidates.”

Within days, Twitter started enforcing their rule change. They began purging the accounts of conservatives, and then . . . they finally crossed the line. Twitter “fact checked” President Trump’s tweets and labeled them as “Fake News.”

The source of Twitter’s “fact checking” was none other than CNN, an incredibly biased network that President Trump recently sued for defamation.

The Heritage Foundation tracks the convictions of voter fraud, and their database has 1,285 examples of proven voter fraud – which is just the tip of the iceberg as voter fraud is rarely investigated or prosecuted.

The VAST majority of those convictions are “fraudulent use of absentee ballots,” which is what President Trump said in his tweet.

Rather than present those easy to find facts, Twitter and CNN chose to discredit the President of the United States who is working hard to protect our votes from being stolen.

And it’s going to get worse . . . much worse.

Social Media is the most influential form of communication in our modern age and Social Media WILL make a MASSIVE impact on our elections in November. It already is.

As the Republican congressional candidate in Florida’s 21st congressional district, which is President Trump’s home district, my campaign has been denied access to all social media. As President Trump said last night, “this is election interference”.

This is why I need to be in Congress, [and it’s why I’m asking you to donate now and help me get there](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-377408-888711-5016517-c110cc2862-a165796074).

Jack Dorsey and Mark Zuckerberg know who I am and they know that when I get into Congress, they will be FORCED to change . . . especially now with the help of President Trump who pledged this morning:

President Trump will need warriors in Congress who understand how critical this issue is to stand on the front lines as he takes on Big Tech. As the “most banned woman in the world” I know this isn’t just about taking your Twitter account away, it’s about taking away your voice.

Let’s finally put an end to Big Tech’s control over our elections, our thoughts and our voices. I am already on the frontlines and have been for years. [Send me to Washington to finally stop the bias](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-377408-888711-5016517-c110cc2862-a165796074)!

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-377408-888711-84585d41bbe610b-a165796074)

---

name: Republican Fundraising Updates
subject: Maintaining the Senate Majority is more important than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
With just over 150 days until election day, it is absolutely imperative that we continue to build our grassroots team. And with only a few days left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're reaching out to our most dedicated supporters to ensure that we have what it takes to stand up to the radical Left this year.
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs **YOU** to help him in this fight. _
---

Friend,

With just over 150 days until election day, it is absolutely imperative that we continue to build our grassroots team. And with only a few days left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're reaching out to our most dedicated supporters to ensure that we have what it takes to stand up to the radical Left this year.

Todd Young (R-IN) and his team have extended 5X MATCH capabilities until midnight on May 31st in a final effort to meet their monthly goal. Todd needs your help to continue defending President Trump's Senate Majority and fighting for his pro-growth agenda.

clean_body: With just over 150 days until election day, it is absolutely imperative that we continue to build our grassroots team. And with only a few days left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're reaching out to our most dedicated supporters to ensure that we have what it takes to stand up to the radical Left this year. Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority. Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide. This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs YOU to help him in this fight. Friend, With just over 150 days until election day, it is absolutely imperative that we continue to build our grassroots team. And with only a few days left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're reaching out to our most dedicated supporters to ensure that we have what it takes to stand up to the radical Left this year. Todd Young (R-IN) and his team have extended 5X MATCH capabilities until midnight on May 31st in a final effort to meet their monthly goal. Todd needs your help to continue defending President Trump's Senate Majority and fighting for his pro-growth agenda. Rush in your donation to provide Todd and his team the necessary backing to defend the Majority and continue fighting for YOU! == == == == == == Remember, Friend, without your support, the Senate Majority, and the progress that President Trump has made so far, will be for nothing. We cannot allow the far-Left to undo years of hard work that has brought America back from the cusp of disaster under 8 years of Obama. == Thank you for your unwavering support of Senate Republicans! The only way we can secure a GOP win in this district is by reaching our critical May fundraising goal!
Friend,
Nancy Pelosi is combing through our campaign's finance reports, looking for any sign of weakness right now. She has already instructed her far left donors in California, New York, and Chicago to dump millions of dollars to support her preferred candidate, Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan winning this key seat.
We can't afford to give an inch in this critical race! In 2018, Rodney won this seat with less than 2,000 votes to spare, making **_this is the top congressional race in the nation_**. The only way we can secure a GOP win in this district is by reaching our critical May fundraising goal!

name: Campaign Update from Cory Gardner
subject: Schumer, Biden, Abrams, Buttigieg, Klobuchar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
FYI, Cory Gardner's radical leftwing opponent, John Hickenlooper, is now endorsed by Chuck Schumer, Joe Biden, Stacey Abrams, as well as not one but two other failed presidential candidates, Pete Buttigieg, and Amy Klobuchar.
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._

name: Erika Williams, Booker for Kentucky
subject: Can you help pay for our yard signs?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Usually, we would be knocking on doors and talking to voters in-person about the election. But now with COVID-19, we need to be more creative in our voter outreach and focus on other ways to get our message out.
#
Hi, it’s nice to meet you. My name is Erika – I’m a volunteer for the Charles Booker campaign for U.S. Senate.
Now that the election is less than four weeks away, the volunteer team is working hard to make sure every undecided voter knows the name Charles Booker and learns about our bold, progressive movement.
Usually, we would be knocking on doors and talking to voters in-person about the election. But now with COVID-19, we need to be more creative in our voter outreach and focus on other ways to get our message out.
**So this week, we started printing and distributing our brand new yard signs!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17649184/201705895/-225423351?refcode=em20200527-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ3ZDJiZC03MmEwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-rV_EAm6pINqxNAhs3mBmRGw493f8pyYWb3iFFzNrg=)
**[Will you chip in $3 to our Yard Sign Fund and help us safely deliver more yard signs for people so they can show their neighbors how big and strong our movement is? It’s more critical than ever we make our support visible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17649198/201705909/-225423351?refcode=em20200527-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ3ZDJiZC03MmEwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-rV_EAm6pINqxNAhs3mBmRGw493f8pyYWb3iFFzNrg=)**
**[Contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17649199/201705910/-225423351?refcode=em20200527-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ3ZDJiZC03MmEwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-rV_EAm6pINqxNAhs3mBmRGw493f8pyYWb3iFFzNrg=)**
So far, we’ve invested nearly $3,000 in printing yard signs.
The response has been great. Supporters have been so excited to post their yard signs in their community and spread the word about our movement.
**Especially in a competitive primary like this, every yard sign counts if it means one more person googling “Who is Charles Booker?” and deciding to vote for us. **
**[We plan on investing another $1,000 in printing out more yard signs, but we need your help to cover the cost. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17649200/201705911/-225423351?refcode=em20200527-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ3ZDJiZC03MmEwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-rV_EAm6pINqxNAhs3mBmRGw493f8pyYWb3iFFzNrg=)[Can you chip in anything you can to help pay for our yard signs? There’s no such thing as a small donation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17649201/201705912/-225423351?refcode=em20200527-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWQ3ZDJiZC03MmEwLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-rV_EAm6pINqxNAhs3mBmRGw493f8pyYWb3iFFzNrg=)**

Erika

clean_body: Usually, we would be knocking on doors and talking to voters in-person about the election. But now with COVID-19, we need to be more creative in our voter outreach and focus on other ways to get our message out. Hi, it’s nice to meet you. My name is Erika – I’m a volunteer for the Charles Booker campaign for U.S. Senate. Now that the election is less than four weeks away, the volunteer team is working hard to make sure every undecided voter knows the name Charles Booker and learns about our bold, progressive movement. Usually, we would be knocking on doors and talking to voters in-person about the election. But now with COVID-19, we need to be more creative in our voter outreach and focus on other ways to get our message out. So this week, we started printing and distributing our brand new yard signs! = = = So far, we’ve invested nearly $3,000 in printing yard signs. The response has been great. Supporters have been so excited to post their yard signs in their community and spread the word about our movement. Especially in a competitive primary like this, every yard sign counts if it means one more person googling “Who is Charles Booker?” and deciding to vote for us. = = Thanks for the help, Erika P.S. If you want your own yard sign, **=** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Warren
subject: Our next deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Every single contribution, of any size, is another sign that we're still in this fight to make America work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. Every single donor helps fight for real relief | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573a/45c30650/1c8fa9266/66e9d30e/1763513442/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
It's easy to lose track of time these days, but believe it or not, June is just a few days away.

Elizabeth had a busy May, including...
* endorsing a new round of Warren Democrats running for state legislature, the U.S. House, and the U.S. Senate,
* demanding accountability for how the Trump administration is spending taxpayer dollars and failing to respond to this crisis,
* and fighting to ensure safe voting in every state, guarantee an Essential Workers Bill of Rights, and protect the Postal Service from Donald Trump's partisan manipulation.

But she hasn't done it alone -- it's only been possible with the support of grassroots supporters like you. And as a movement, in just a few days, we're up against our next big test: our end-of-May fundraising deadline.

If we hit our goal, we'll be able to stay on track to expand our fight in June and beyond. If we fall short, we'll have some harder decisions to make.

**Elizabeth knows that not everyone can make a donation right now, but if you're able to contribute, now would be a perfect moment.

[If you can, please chip in $2 or whatever you can before Sunday's deadline to help hit our goal. You'll help make sure that side by side, we can keep fighting just as hard in June, win up and down the ballot in November, and start making big, structural change in January and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573a/45c30650/1c8fa9266/66e9d371/1763513442/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjE3Rl9FT01fTEFVX1RfMjAyMDA1MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR17F_EOM_LAU_T_20200527_V1S2_P")**

Every single contribution, of any size, is another sign that we're still in this fight to make America work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

Every single donor helps fight for real relief to get through this crisis in the short term -- and long-term solutions to the deep, systemic problems that the pandemic has magnified.

And every single member of Warren Democrats makes our movement that much stronger.

**[Sunday's deadline is just a few days away, and sometimes it feels like time is flying by-- so if you're in a place where you can donate, please chip in right now to help hit our critical May goal.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573a/45c30650/1c8fa9266/66e9d371/1763513442/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjE3Rl9FT01fTEFVX1RfMjAyMDA1MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR17F_EOM_LAU_T_20200527_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for everything -- we're grateful to have you on this team, and we hope you've been able to stay safe and healthy.

Warren Democrats

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852573a/45c30650/1c8fa9266/66e9d371/1763513442/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjE3Rl9FT01fTEFVX1RfMjAyMDA1MjdfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR17F_EOM_LAU_T_20200527_V1S2_P")

name: Sec. Def. Chuck Hagel
subject: I'm endorsing Admiral Franken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
In these challenging times, our country needs leaders -- leaders of character, experience, integrity, and courage. And I know Iowa has that in Admiral Mike Franken.
|
---
| |
---

| | In these challenging times, our country needs leaders -- leaders of character, experience, integrity, and courage. And I know Iowa has that in Admiral Mike Franken. That's why I had to speak out and correct the record after the unfounded attacks on his service. I endorse Mike because of his years of selfless and dedicated service to our country. I've worked with him and seen how he conducts himself up close. **I 'm helping him any way I can, and [I hope you can click here and support him too.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2563/33365068/4a7a3918/3f8bcade/2464262732/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200527_em_fr_hagel_all_l1")** He helmed fleets in hostile areas of operation, with thousands of Sailors, Soldiers, Marines, and Air Force personnel under his command. His love of country and dedication to those he was selected to lead is unparalleled and unwavering. I asked him to create, organize, and obtain congressional support for the Defense POW/MIA Accounting Agency (DPAA) to bring closure to the families of missing soldiers. His mission: locate, retrieve, and identify the remains of lost soldiers from WWII. Today, the DPAA fulfills its sacred mission with efficiency and meaning. This is only one of many of Admiral Franken's accomplishments during his long, distinguished career. The attacks on his service are deplorable, but I know that will only strengthen his resolve and harden his focus. **I urge all Iowans to vote for him on June 2nd, and if you can,[support his campaign by clicking here](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2563/33365068/4a7a3918/3f8bcadf/2464262732/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200527_em_fr_hagel_all_l2").** Thank you, Chuck

name: Team Mackler
subject: Trump fired FIVE watchdogs in SIX weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
we can't let this go unnoticed:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11d/18d6a294/4ca33986/26d60798/1127778403/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | In only six weeks, President Trump has removed **FIVE** inspectors general. We can't let this get swept under the rug -- inspectors general are independent investigators who make sure powerful Executive Branch agencies carry out their missions fairly and legally. But Trump doesn't like that. And neither does Mike Pompeo who ordered the State Department watchdog be fired **because his own actions were being investigated for wrongdoing.** [_**HELP US HOLD THE TRUMP ADMINISTRATION ACCOUNTABLE ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11d/18d6a294/4ca33986/26d60799/1127778403/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MjciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200527?refcode=jme200527_m_other&refcode2=107423") | | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11d/18d6a294/4ca33986/26d60799/1127778403/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MjciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200527?refcode=jme200527_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Trump promised to "drain the swamp," but instead, he's surrounded himself with his allies and loyalists who let him do whatever he wants. And now, he wants to send our opponent Bill Hagerty to be another rubber stamp for him in the Senate.
As a combat veteran, James knows we need to hold elected officials accountable. That's why he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. He's in this race for **Tennesseans** \-- not Washington insiders or their special-interest agendas.
[_**James needs our grassroots support to win in November. If you can, chip in today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11d/18d6a294/4ca33986/26d60799/1127778403/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MjciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200527?refcode=jme200527_m_other&refcode2=107423")

That's why he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. He's in this race for Tennesseans \-- not Washington insiders or their special-interest agendas. "" | | "" Thanks, Team Mackler | | | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. name: Kunal, Christy for Congress
subject: Garcia's first week in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Mike Garcia's been in office for just one week.

And instead of getting to work right away to help our district get through this pandemic or solve some of our country's biggest problems... **he started off his tenure in Congress by trying to force a vote on extreme anti-choice legislation.**

Garcia said, "That was a no-brainer for me."

**What's a no-brainer for us is that we have to get this guy out of office this November and elect Christy,** who will go to Washington to be productive for us all -- not prioritize extreme, partisan snipe hunts.

**[Chip in $5 or more to Christy's campaign now to make sure we have a new leader as soon as possible. The fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching on Sunday night -- can you give before then to help meet our goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb94/29776869/9b97903/569f397f/396969975/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjdfZW9tMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200527_eom1-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb94/29776869/9b97903/569f3978/396969975/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjdfZW9tMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200527_eom1-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb94/29776869/9b97903/569f3979/396969975/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjdfZW9tMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200527_eom1-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb94/29776869/9b97903/569f3974/396969975/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjdfZW9tMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200527_eom1-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb94/29776869/9b97903/569f397f/396969975/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjdfZW9tMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200527_eom1-full")
We knew that Mike Garcia was going to fall into line behind Republican party extremists when he got to Congress. We just didn't think it would happen a few hours after he was sworn into office.

For too long, our district has gone without representation. But now we have a representative who listens to party leaders and extreme special interests, not the voters of CA-25.

**That's why we're going to hold Mike Garcia accountable for every action he takes in Congress. And that's why we're going to beat him this November.**

**[Help make sure we have what it takes to stand up to Garcia and elect Christy this November -- pitch in $5 or whatever you can to our campaign today.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb94/29776869/9b97903/569f397f/396969975/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjdfZW9tMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200527_eom1-full")**

Thanks for stepping up. We have to get this guy out of here.

\-- Kunal

Kunal Atit
Deputy Campaign Manager, Christy for Congress

Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights.

| Peter,

**BREAKING NEWS** : President Trump just said new papers make it CLEAR that the Obama Administration SPIED on the Trump Campaign and beyond.

**This is bigger than Watergate, and the liberal media is largely ignoring it.**

Those involved in Obamagate must be brought to justice so that the people will have faith in the system once again, because there is none at the moment.

The rule of law and justice must be served.

[**We have to take action. We've started a petition calling on Congress to investigate Obamagate.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=bde6f9cbec&e=795c6d9796)

This is being called "one of the biggest" cover-ups in American history. It's time to get to the truth.

[**Congress needs to act now! SIGN THE PETITION TODAY and then share, tweet, or forward this email to at least 3 people**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4bd7481625&e=795c6d9796)[.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c250305fb2&e=795c6d9796)

When I get to Washington, I'm going to straight to the halls of Congress to call for an investigation into Obamagate.

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: need your help SOON
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
May was a HUGE month for our campaign to take back PA-07. Even in the midst of a global pandemic, we’re reaching voters all across the Lehigh Valley Peter, May was a HUGE month for our campaign to take back PA-07.
Even in the midst of a global pandemic, we’re reaching voters all across the Lehigh Valley, tackling the issues that hardworking Pennsylvanians care about, and getting out the vote from all corners of the district.
Along the way, the noise coming from the Lehigh Valley that we are READY for change has reached the President of the United States. Last Friday, we officially received the complete and total endorsement from President Donald J. Trump... clean_body: May was a HUGE month for our campaign to take back PA-07. Even in the midst of a global pandemic, we’re reaching voters all across the Lehigh Valley Peter, May was a HUGE month for our campaign to take back PA-07. Even in the midst of a global pandemic, we’re reaching voters all across the Lehigh Valley, tackling the issues that hardworking Pennsylvanians care about, and getting out the vote from all corners of the district. Along the way, the noise coming from the Lehigh Valley that we are READY for change has reached the President of the United States. Last Friday, we officially received the complete and total endorsement from President Donald J. Trump... Take a look for yourself: Peter, while I’m tremendously grateful for the support from our nation’s commander in chief, we cannot and must not stop there. We still have a long way to go, and Peter, we need you... As you’re well aware, our primary election is just a few days away, and we have a lot at stake. That’s why RIGHT NOW we are launching a ‘PROTECT CONSERVATIVE VALUES FUND’ where every dollar that is given from now until Friday at midnight will be put toward ensuring we do everything possible to ensure that Liberals like Tax-Hiking Dean Browning who want to raise up our taxes won’t see the light of day in congress come next Tuesday. Friend, Did you see Chris's email? **We are now only a few weeks out from the June 23rd Special Election and our campaign needs your help more than ever!** [Can you help us make sure we have the resources necessary to win on Election Day by donating $10, $25, or $50 today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/CWnsxgq2EP4wYbzVSljaeg/4VDqD3lU6GT3763F9FveGkZA) **Every dollar we raise will go towards keeping our positive message on the airwaves and letting voters know they have a conservative choice for Congress on June 23rd.** \- Team Jacobs \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Chris Jacobs
Date: Tue, May 26, 2020

name: Stacey Abrams Alert
subject: Will you follow her lead, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We were starting to think we were toast.
| | |
---
Friend, we were starting to think we were toast.

The GOP was raising MILLIONS to buy this Senate seat in Georgia, and our grassroots support wasn't where it needed to be to fight back.
**But then Stacey Abrams asked you to support this campaign to elect Reverend Warnock ... and donations SKYROCKETED!**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e465/288179be/bc34f83/348eab43/2646894533/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk249-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
But now we're up against another critical midnight deadline - and with time running out, we're still falling incredibly short of our $10,000 goal. We need Democrats like you to act NOW - **or else, we could lose our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. **
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate this November, and _The Washington Post_ __ says winning in Georgia is KEY - but we can only get it done by hitting every single fundraising goal.
Even with Kelly Loeffler (R) flooding this race with $20 million of her own fortune, polling now shows this race in a dead heat. **That 's why we're counting on you to follow Stacey's lead and chip in right now - before time runs out: [_Please, give $5 or more now - as much as you can spare - before midnight tonight to help us win this race, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate!_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e465/288179be/bc34f83/348eab43/2646894533/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk249-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Barack Obama
subject: I'm personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Joe Biden and my friends at the DNC have an important end-of-month deadline coming up, and I’d hate to see them fall short. | |
---
Derek, The crisis we face underscores the necessity for real leadership in the White House. I know from firsthand experience that Joe Biden is up for the job. Joe’s optimism and vision for America will get this country back on track and restore the soul of this nation, as he likes to say. But Derek, we should never for a moment assume that getting him back to the White House will be easy. So, I’m doing everything I can to make sure that Joe and Democrats up and down the ballot will have the resources they need to win on November 3. And what they raise right now in these early months will determine whether or not they have the resources they need for those final, difficult months. **That’s why I’m reaching out today. Joe and my friends at the DNC have an important end-of-month deadline coming up, and I’d hate to see them fall short. Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between them today?** ** ****[ DONATE: $10 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CwE/ni0YAA/t.324/mgXD5AhbRD6lpEqRGqbfVw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLk-2FKhrQ-2BStgE-2B8zrrY0y3lA7Zf36qtW35qBztfDVLH5WVFmp-2BibIzKylSW-2FUgy-2BUg9U5i3tQlF-2BA900VGZDUqvDCXCahHv3fH8uyJOLX-2FzR-2Fn7-2BN2edDc-2F7Rzz1KVN7s-2B8UP4e388ZWx7jYD-2Fc3QRE0JDdpBdAtSbcUUs00Pl3Md-2B50Wo9IGHXuSE9uPZSWIa9fLlztXLZh1KuLGjBub0YIv-2BZYTRvCT0qPBekthh89f3KT9nP-2Bemg8mjY06VIhTjzxoypF0syAbxxRMOxq-2Bz-2B6hcclz0kY3hV8YZxiFvFNVKbWqcd-2BH2UconOH9LYrKQ-3D/4FcG)

[ Donate another amount ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CwE/ni0YAA/t.324/mgXD5AhbRD6lpEqRGqbfVw/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLk-2FKhrQ-2BStgE-2B8zrrY0y3lA7Zf36qtW35qBztfDVLH5R0ajtUzFfpavrC4rDNKxAhphAYlVp3ZcwtvHXeLIuBTrWsQP08qA1QtZa-2FI4DaUQ-2B-2FLLC4WUlBF-2Ff-2FrHT9N1LGIA-2BY8-2B-2FA0HJsbW6nIK5cF11oPracX3J1A-2BdSZVw-2Fnliw5x0DWCgs8hB4tLFvE5jJSMdqf9-2BpcNMTkVw1YRnJw193EZ5ku-2B9qceHlLeg-2BUXK1-2BTWSp-2Fx-2BiTM2beLvqK5oXQhK8HgUGCzt6vzlCc-2Fn5CWSCE344C3-2BBARV-2FXiGXpdlfvpkj2T289aRx4qDRFO8-3D/zSmj)
** ** ** For decades, Joe brought change to Washington, but Washington never changed him. Because Joe Biden is, simply put, a unifier. It’s who he is, it’s who he has been since he was a scrappy kid from Scranton. He brings everyone to the table; it’s what he was raised to do. Picking Joe Biden as my vice president was the first big decision I made as a nominee. And Derek, it was the best one. He has the foreign policy know-how to think fast on his feet, world leaders know him and respect him, and I was always glad to have his expertise by my side in the Situation Room. More importantly, he understands what people are going through right now. He’s walked in our shoes. As a kid, he had to leave Scranton while his dad changed jobs to keep his family afloat. As a single dad, he took the train to and from Washington to tuck his own boys in at night. He knows that life can shatter with a single phone call, and that’s why he’s always made decisions with people going through their toughest times in mind. **[I can’t wait to get out there and campaign for Joe and Democrats up and down the ballot. I’m going to roll up my sleeves and get to work every day. I hope you’ll join me, and I hope you’ll start with splitting a $10 donation between Joe Biden and the DNC today. Democrats up and down the ticket are depending on you.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CwE/ni0YAA/t.324/mgXD5AhbRD6lpEqRGqbfVw/h6/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLk-2FKhrQ-2BStgE-2B8zrrY0y3lA7Zf36qtW35qBztfDVLH5R0ajtUzFfpavrC4rDNKxAiHn79q0GjSdq1CA7A5Qh2oo9Lnrr7Labx5CEcq9A3PhjW5191aLrWFjxaqRqP8Q9IpQqiDywKMHfY2ziWgk9FextCvj-2BXU2dASVCBq-2FtPf5oeVUohIWAQsEQjypQsQ17C7qahxiOtcgjiOlaXZ9-2FuY261s1omD-2F1krkUbhD1uDsgwPu6wwAt-2BuiEHq6ySZ0e9nrZ4la3C-2ByuIOriq7JFfhTA42WeLnUpufCJpFhHEO3HDwbtHUD8xRSaPM-2BpvetT8-3D/W0CP)** Out of this crisis, we can build a more just, more generous, more democratic America where everybody has a fair shot at opportunity. clean_body: Joe Biden and my friends at the DNC have an important end-of-month deadline coming up, and I’d hate to see them fall short. | | Derek, The crisis we face underscores the necessity for real leadership in the White House. I know from firsthand experience that Joe Biden is up for the job. Joe’s optimism and vision for America will get this country back on track and restore the soul of this nation, as he likes to say. But Derek, we should never for a moment assume that getting him back to the White House will be easy. So, I’m doing everything I can to make sure that Joe and Democrats up and down the ballot will have the resources they need to win on November 3. And what they raise right now in these early months will determine whether or not they have the resources they need for those final, difficult months. That’s why I’m reaching out today. Joe and my friends at the DNC have an important end-of-month deadline coming up, and I’d hate to see them fall short. Can I count on you to split a $10 donation between them today? For decades, Joe brought change to Washington, but Washington never changed him. Because Joe Biden is, simply put, a unifier. It’s who he is, it’s who he has been since he was a scrappy kid from Scranton. He brings everyone to the table; it’s what he was raised to do. Picking Joe Biden as my vice president was the first big decision I made as a nominee. And Derek, it was the best one. He has the foreign policy know-how to think fast on his feet, world leaders know him and respect him, and I was always glad to have his expertise by my side in the Situation Room. More importantly, he understands what people are going through right now. He’s walked in our shoes. As a kid, he had to leave Scranton while his dad changed jobs to keep his family afloat. As a single dad, he took the train to and from Washington to tuck his own boys in at night. He knows that life can shatter with a single phone call, and that’s why he’s always made decisions with people going through their toughest times in mind. Out of this crisis, we can build a more just, more generous, more democratic America where everybody has a fair shot at opportunity. But that all depends on the work we put in now to make Joe our next president. Let's get to work, Barack Obama

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: Back on Track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Rising temperatures and increased hours of sunshine (sunset is now after 9 p.m. ET!) have many Hoosiers throughout the state looking to get out [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0303e16b99fa472bbdad321a37ef9c9a&_e=hV2AZGwaNrDFe_WktSFHwC4GPwog-hSLVoYEgkAwgJaS4Ximt7VVLQOoOdedZ96P-ofp7pbm53THFI7Zpq3YjwXFiZ5iML5ZY7sk2V91PndlWPNSpCh-f0RMLb5tM3QERZRWt5IMZ84ey2Ef8ECbXa66_XH1VQayzUD7z55J34sR9H3ibDgEeox8D-vivIybd7p_e0LHC_XqhuFdvGgCkdE6livAI-vAZi2eOUSDu0tuSS9s0ZqGSyHP49-CpOJybRxOkNNLFoIa4ODfRWSB8l4RiZANNsG886rbRcTFbs4int79ormLK6BIPk_QvtO-hPogxVVe4a5wvdvvG-G9Nvax18BWb9tLMsKP0UATy91FNr--c_PnCSdQDTvnVtMfuZl1yUNbZCBuKVHQp5Mqi3vXZ6-aNQSAgfX0PCZ0JRu6Ni-WhfY7zWNorOCB_iAh) Friend, Memorial Day is officially behind us. **That means that the unofficial start of summer in Indiana is now underway!** Rising temperatures and increased hours of sunshine **(sunset is now after 9 p.m. ET!)** have many Hoosiers throughout the state looking to get out and about. Most of Indiana officially entered **[Phase 3 of the Back on Track plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0303e16b99fa472bbdad321a37ef9c9a&_e=hV2AZGwaNrDFe_WktSFHwC4GPwog-hSLVoYEgkAwgJaS4Ximt7VVLQOoOdedZ96P-ofp7pbm53THFI7Zpq3YjwXFiZ5iML5ZY7sk2V91PndlWPNSpCh-f0RMLb5tM3QERZRWt5IMZ84ey2Ef8ECbXa66_XH1VQayzUD7z55J34sR9H3ibDgEeox8D-vivIybd7p_e0LHC_XqhuFdvGgCkdE6livAI-vAZi2eOUSDu0vdWAYSyXHIN5ITtv7W_uc0gV74gb83DY-iJg5sl7kTcqcY0gVqtiVP59KZ06IMwZnYBdORc8JTTacQ3fpLhErOOTjPl-GTAMU8hNZdRodRuQKoEpFcooPHGFE-lgImIRkXSuLwdooH2q9j3QZ2azusoDKUfI7AUxmh-EbWMkUXIPbM2FjOehVs0_UHI56YMtc4QY9hJSpWZ__AG7ommIkA)** on Friday (a few days early). And Hoosiers have earned it! As a whole, we’ve done a great job social distancing and following safety guidelines. And as a result, hospital admissions have remained low and our surge capacity has remained strong. _But what’s open now? What are capacity limits? And what are recommendations to stay safe? Here’s a quick rundown of what you need to know._ [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0303e16b99fa472bbdad321a37ef9c9a&_e=hV2AZGwaNrDFe_WktSFHwC4GPwog-hSLVoYEgkAwgJaS4Ximt7VVLQOoOdedZ96P-ofp7pbm53THFI7Zpq3YjwXFiZ5iML5ZY7sk2V91PndlWPNSpCh-f0RMLb5tM3QERZRWt5IMZ84ey2Ef8ECbXa66_XH1VQayzUD7z55J34sR9H3ibDgEeox8D-vivIybd7p_e0LHC_XqhuFdvGgCkdE6livAI-vAZi2eOUSDu0vfaGZ0h5wC4WNXkxQ0Jl6fud1sF28z4X0dBcz8eOxQMDQX06dYmS8bQBxOWlY-Eo1kdlhErSDvPO7dfIlHXw19cIgKAO7Ql0UxofhKGLPATpp_b5EjcTDuNxMO8M8c4adcYGztV93onl41oCtu6-r9cHZ1FAwMHPX1hlR4TZdCJcmqyYH6GcPH3FGBweT3dnQOjIqAGi8t0ElsLTU57tQL)
* **Shopping:** Shops and small businesses can now open at 75% capacity while maintaining social distancing.
* **Going Out to Eat:** The dining room at your favorite restaurant can now be open at 50% capacity, with groups sitting at every other table.
* **Gyms & Fitness:** Get ready to sweat! Your favorite gym can now open with limited class sizes, social distancing, and equipment cleaned after every use.
* **Entertainment:** State parks have been open, and remain open! Does a drive-in movie sound like fun? Because that’s open, too!
* **Outdoor Recreation:** Let’s get outside! Playgrounds remain closed, but community tennis courts, basketball courts, soccer and baseball fields are open with social gathering guidelines.
* **Camping:** Another great way to get outside. Indiana campgrounds can now be open with social distancing, sanitation, and proper precautions.
* **Day Camps & Non-Contact Sports:** Community recreational youth and adult sports may resume practices and conditioning. And kids’ summer camps can open starting June 1!
* **Community Pools:** Grab your swimsuit! Community pools can open, but they must follow CDC guidance.
* **Personal Services:** Really need a haircut? We get it. Personal services like haircuts are now open by appointment.

**[Phase 3](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0303e16b99fa472bbdad321a37ef9c9a&_e=hV2AZGwaNrDFe_WktSFHwC4GPwog-hSLVoYEgkAwgJaS4Ximt7VVLQOoOdedZ96P-ofp7pbm53THFI7Zpq3YjwXFiZ5iML5ZY7sk2V91PndlWPNSpCh-f0RMLb5tM3QERZRWt5IMZ84ey2Ef8ECbXa66_XH1VQayzUD7z55J34sR9H3ibDgEeox8D-vivIybd7p_e0LHC_XqhuFdvGgCkdE6livAI-vAZi2eOUSDu0vy8WMIa-verS0l31vE22IOhhIBmhJVJkOqNQG3IlpJ4k88ZuDtwo5uIw1nWabcGVGAPJ_tYytFFxwe7_c7RlCg0C8uc9SVMyOd555iNxjbQMtu_gAnueG4kdMkbAPtWXlUI-ygkjLPQjXA3Z8UBo4L3-2pjOl7j4CP2aTNGtH5sw1OKnTOjhQ5pr-y9r08BfshQZYO9bNXECB0bn2prpzU)** is now active in most of Indiana – and is slated to kick-start in Marion, Lake and Cass counties on June 1. **[You can learn more about Phase 3 here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0303e16b99fa472bbdad321a37ef9c9a&_e=hV2AZGwaNrDFe_WktSFHwC4GPwog-hSLVoYEgkAwgJaS4Ximt7VVLQOoOdedZ96P-ofp7pbm53THFI7Zpq3YjwXFiZ5iML5ZY7sk2V91PndlWPNSpCh-f0RMLb5tM3QERZRWt5IMZ84ey2Ef8ECbXa66_XH1VQayzUD7z55J34sR9H3ibDgEeox8D-vivIybd7p_e0LHC_XqhuFdvGgCkdE6livAI-vAZi2eOUSDu0uWd1US9cj72nCwzFIWzhZomh-ztGc-nCbidjnNiFLCOvtQGhLpJCjJzydowKMaU2Vg6jZ4_hR04sMaE9sfBsiHYlbA2itKShFDga7uel2Elv5W-9H_afB7xWzOJ---Duu-r3vLSypTKhPecn2mQaYl0D8EUCZXEkymNlu-YSCuE0sUcTx4Fzgrr9S2dSQhykP9u_wD4cv_uqOTtg_HT0Uc)** **Of course – don’t forget. If you’re getting out, let’s be safe.** Wear your mask, keep at least six feet from other groups, wash your hands frequently, use hand sanitizer – and together, let’s keep our fellow Hoosiers safe, and keep getting back on track! #BackonTrack, -Your Holcomb Crew |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump delivers for America’s seniors
body:
During his career as a pediatric neurosurgeon, HUD Secretary Ben Carson saw firsthand how resilient Americans are in times of crisis... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f90990267&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 27, 2020
---
| | |
# **An update on today’s space launch**

**President Trump,** First Lady Melania Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and Second Lady Karen Pence traveled to Florida today to witness American astronauts launch into space from U.S. soil for the first time in nearly a decade.

**Due to bad weather** , NASA has postponed the launch to Saturday, May 30, at 3:22 p.m. ET.

**“Safety for our crew** members Col. Doug Hurley and Col. Bob Behnken is our top priority,” NASA Administrator Jim Bridenstine wrote on Twitter. Coverage for Saturday’s “Launch America” mission will begin at 11 a.m. ET on [NASA TV](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fe946efd5&e=3ee4985eea).

[“NASA: We’re going back to the moon, and beyond”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12881ce552&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **🎬****Dr. Ben Carson: How America will beat this virus**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47964cd24a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **During his ****career**** ** as a pediatric neurosurgeon, HUD Secretary Ben Carson saw firsthand how resilient Americans are in times of crisis and personal difficulty.

**Time and again** , his patients—along with their families—showed grace and resolve despite the obstacles being thrown in their way. “I am seeing exactly the same thing in our country with the COVID-19 crisis,” he said.

**“People coming together** —this is the way that we will win.”

**Fortunately,** **that light** at the end of the tunnel is coming into view. After months of sacrifice by Americans of all backgrounds to slow the spread of Coronavirus, all 50 states are in a position to begin reopening now or very soon. Many states already have.

**Before Coronavirus,** America was in the midst of an economic rejuvenation. Historically marginalized communities, including African-American and Hispanic Americans, were witnessing near-record-low unemployment and poverty rates just a few months ago. The same was true for women and Americans without a college degree.

**Now** , **the Trump Administration** is working hard “to bring that renewal back again and make it even stronger and better than it ever was before,” Secretary Carson says.

**🎬** [America’s renaissance is ready for a comeback](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47cf7501a1&e=3ee4985eea)

**Scott Turner:** [The Trump Administration is leaving no community behind!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bbc2895c49&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **President Trump delivers for America’s seniors**

**Yesterday, President Trump** delivered a breakthrough for many American seniors, announcing action that will dramatically slash the cost of insulin for Medicare enrollees.

**🎬****President Trump:** [We’re fixing the shortcomings of Obamacare!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=05c7f2472f&e=3ee4985eea)

**“For hundreds and thousands** of seniors enrolled in Medicare—that’s a big deal—participating plans will cap cost at just $35 a month per type of insulin, and some plans may offer it free,” President Trump said from the Rose Garden.

**“In the past,** Obamacare prevented insurance providers from competing to offer lower costs for seniors. There was no competition—there was no anything—and they ran away with what took place. And the seniors were horribly hurt.”

**One in three seniors** on Medicare suffers from diabetes, and over 3.3 million of these beneficiaries use at least one type of insulin. These patients have seen their out-of-pocket costs skyrocket—but thanks to President Trump, that’s about to change.

[MORE: President Trump is reducing the cost of insulin for America’s seniors.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2ef90846b&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****President Trump:** [America’s seniors deserve better—and we’re delivering it](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a29218e518&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Seema Verma, Administrator for the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, delivers remarks on protecting seniors with diabetes** | May 26, 2020
---
|

The same was true for women and Americans without a college degree. Now , the Trump Administration is working hard “to bring that renewal back again and make it even stronger and better than it ever was before,” Secretary Carson says. 🎬 Scott Turner: | | President Trump delivers for America’s seniors Yesterday, President Trump delivered a breakthrough for many American seniors, announcing action that will dramatically slash the cost of insulin for Medicare enrollees. 🎬President Trump: “For hundreds and thousands of seniors enrolled in Medicare—that’s a big deal—participating plans will cap cost at just $35 a month per type of insulin, and some plans may offer it free,” President Trump said from the Rose Garden. “In the past, Obamacare prevented insurance providers from competing to offer lower costs for seniors. There was no competition—there was no anything—and they ran away with what took place. And the seniors were horribly hurt.” One in three seniors on Medicare suffers from diabetes, and over 3.3 million of these beneficiaries use at least one type of insulin. These patients have seen their out-of-pocket costs skyrocket—but thanks to President Trump, that’s about to change. 🎬President Trump: | | Photo of the Day | | Seema Verma, Administrator for the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, delivers remarks on protecting seniors with diabetes | May 26, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Mark Warner
subject: The Senate is in recess
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Senate went into recess without voting on a single piece of coronavirus legislation. I'm reaching out to you today to break down that process and talk about my priorities in the Senate moving forw
|
---
| | This is pretty frustrating, Derek.

The Senate went into recess without voting on a single piece of coronavirus legislation. I'm reaching out to you today to break down that process and talk about my priorities in the Senate moving forward.

Instead of focusing our attention on making sure everyone has the resources and information they need to come through this pandemic safely, Republican leadership continues to advance judicial nominees for federal and circuit courts.

Let me be frank: voting on qualified judicial nominees is part of the job. But right now, we need to be focused on guiding our country through an unprecedented health crisis, not on packing the courts or rubber-stamping the President's political agenda.

We're facing testing shortages in Virginia and across the country, and the number of coronavirus cases continues to rise. Coupled with unemployment numbers that rival the Great Depression, in my estimation there's a great deal of work to be done before we should be talking about judicial appointments.

I'm ready to get back to the Senate and work on the issues that matter: protecting access to affordable health care, helping the small businesses and workers struggling during this pandemic, and, come November, ensuring that every American is able to safely cast their vote.

My hope is that my Senate colleagues will press forward with me, so we can pass important measures like the Paycheck Security Act, which would reconnect furloughed or laid off workers with their health care benefits and with their paycheck.

We have our work cut out for us. I'm ready to rise and meet this challenge to protect Virginians -- and all Americans -- so we can safely move forward.

Thank you for your support. I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy.

-- Mark Warner
